programme.title: World Poker Tour: Bellagio High Roller - Part 3
programme.desc: Top-tier talent is in Las Vegas to play for $432,000 and the WPT Bellagio High Roller title. Join Phil Hellmuth and Vince Van Patten in the booth with Tom Marchese, Jake Schindler, Sam Soverel, and David Peters battling on the felt in Las Vegas.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Bellagio High Roller - Part 4
programme.desc: Top-tier talent is in Las Vegas to play for $432,000 and the WPT Bellagio High Roller title. Join Phil Hellmuth and Vince Van Patten in the booth with Tom Marchese, Jake Schindler, Sam Soverel, and David Peters battling on the felt in Las Vegas.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Vegas Cash Game - Part 1
programme.desc: Big stars and personalities are in Las Vegas to play for hundreds of thousands of dollars and a Hublot watch. Ben Lamb, Kristen Bicknell, and Randall Emmett headline the star-studded lineup at HyperX Esports Arena.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Vegas Cash Game - Part 2
programme.desc: Big stars and personalities are in Las Vegas to play for hundreds of thousands of dollars and a Hublot watch. Ben Lamb, Kristen Bicknell, and Randall Emmett headline the star-studded lineup at HyperX Esports Arena.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: ClubWPT Challenge the Champs - Part 1
programme.desc: Two ClubWPT qualifiers square off against WPT Champions Mike Sexton, Darren Elias, David Williams, Scotty Nguyen, and more in Las Vegas in a matchup for the ages of Pro versus Average Joe playing for $50,000.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: ClubWPT Challenge the Champs - Part 2
programme.desc: Two ClubWPT qualifiers square off against WPT Champions Mike Sexton, Darren Elias, David Williams, Scotty Nguyen, and more in Las Vegas in a matchup for the ages of Pro versus Average Joe playing for $50,000.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Gardens Poker Championship - Part 1
programme.desc: This $10,000 event features wild card Frank Stepuchin playing versus top pros looking to win their first WPT title and $548,000! Chicken wings, all-ins, and more, this final table has it all!

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Gardens Poker Championship - Part 2
programme.desc: This $10,000 event features wild card Frank Stepuchin playing versus top pros looking to win their first WPT title and $548,000! Chicken wings, all-ins, and more, this final table has it all!

programme.desc: This $10,000 event features wild card Frank Stepuchin playing versus top pros looking to win their first WPT title and $548,000! Chicken wings, all-ins, and more, this final table has it all!

programme.desc: This $10,000 event features wild card Frank Stepuchin playing versus top pros looking to win their first WPT title and $548,000! Chicken wings, all-ins, and more, this final table has it all!

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Borgata - Part 1
programme.desc: The third-largest field in WPT history of 1,415 players is down to six playing for $728,000 and to get their name on the WPT Champions Cup. Watch tonight at HyperX Esports Arena to see who wins their share of the $4.5 million prize pool.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Borgata - Part 2
programme.desc: The third-largest field in WPT history of 1,415 players is down to six playing for $728,000 and to get their name on the WPT Champions Cup. Watch tonight at HyperX Esports Arena to see who wins their share of the $4.5 million prize pool.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Borgata - Part 3
programme.desc: The third-largest field in WPT history of 1,415 players is down to six playing for $728,000 and to get their name on the WPT Champions Cup. Watch tonight at HyperX Esports Arena to see who wins their share of the $4.5 million prize pool.

programme.title: Andromeda: Forkortelse av djevelens skille
programme.desc: Etter at noe av mannskapet er fanget, blir Harper tvunget til å jobbe på en tidsbro for patriarken.

programme.title: Andromeda: Stoler på Gordian Maze
programme.desc: En spion fra Tri Gemma dukker opp på Andromeda i et forsøk på å stjele stjernekartet.

programme.title: Andromeda: En symmetri av ufullkommenhet
programme.desc: Når Rommie blir for emosjonell, kutter skipet hennes tilgang til diagnostikk.

programme.title: Andromeda: Tid ute av sinn
programme.desc: Abyss dreper Bekas venn, og mannskapet må finne ut hvilken informasjon de drepte for.

programme.title: Andromeda: Dissonantintervallet (del 1)
programme.desc: Andromeda redder et skip som returnerer fra fredsforhandlinger med Magog.

programme.title: Andromeda: Dissonantintervallet (del 2)
programme.desc: Magog-angrepet har alvorlige konsekvenser. Andromeda blir ødelagt, Trance og Dylan antas å være de eneste overlevende og Dylan rømmer inn i en tidsrute.

programme.title: Andromeda: Vekten (del 1)
programme.desc: Dylan havner på Seefra, der den overtroiske befolkningen ikke har noen teknologi.

programme.title: Andromeda: Vekten (del 2)
programme.desc: Beka blir dumpet på Seefra etter at Andromeda er stjålet, og Dylan må bevise at skipet er hans.

programme.title: Andromeda: Phear Phactor Phenom
programme.desc: Likevel, på Seefra, finner Dylan Harper, som har tilpasset seg livet der.

programme.title: Andromeda: Engelenes forfall
programme.desc: Det viser seg at Doyle er en android bygget av Harper for å inneholde Rommies kjerneprogrammering.

programme.title: Andromeda: Eschatologi av vår nåtid
programme.desc: Beka vinner en pris fra en radio-DJ, lærer sannheten om Seefra og finner Meethus-diagrammet.

programme.title: Andromeda: Når går rundt ...
programme.desc: En forsker fra det opprinnelige Commonwealth dukker opp, fanget i en tidssløyfe.

programme.title: Andromeda: Forsøk på avrettingsmasse
programme.desc: Flavin kommer tilbake og utløser en gjengkrig og hjelper Dylan til å utvikle seg som et paradin.

programme.title: Andromeda: Så brenn de utemmede landene
programme.desc: En krystall som kan gjenopprette Andromedas kraft blir oppdaget, men for å få den, må Dylan jobbe for gruveeieren.

programme.title: Andromeda: Det som ikke var
programme.desc: Tunneler oppdages på Seefra som kan brukes til å nå åtte andre Seefra-planeter.

programme.title: Andromeda: Testen
programme.desc: Når en gammel mann blir drept, er Beka, Rhade og Harper de viktigste mistenkte og stilles for retten

programme.title: Andromeda: Gjennom et glass mørkt
programme.desc: Rhade leder opprørerne i en kamp mot en krigsherre på Seefra-5.

programme.title: Andromeda: Stolthet før fallet
programme.desc: Dylan oppdager at kjæresten til Beka var Drago Musevini, og han brukte Bekas DNA til å skape Nietzscheans.

programme.title: Andromeda: Måneskinn blir deg
programme.desc: Beka og Rhade finner en test som enten gir dem stor rikdom eller driver dem til galskap.

programme.title: Andromeda: Fortiden er Prolix
programme.desc: Harper oppdager et program som kan ødelegge åtte av Seefra-planetene og drepe millioner.

programme.title: MTV Catfish
programme.desc: Catfish, det populære MTV-programmet som samler par som bare har hatt kontakt via skjermer. I løpet av måneder skal de visstnok ha forelsket seg, men hva skjer når de møtes i virkeligheten for første gang?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bound for Jail
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in a ravine, and crucial evidence has been washed away by severe thunderstorms. Twice, the trail turns cold. Almost 20 years later, an old hat and a chip of stainless steel brings the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sphere of Influence
programme.desc: When an 11-year-old girl disappears from a remote Alaska town, investigators wonder if she has been attacked by a bear or become lost in the dense woods. Eventually, they realize that neither assumption is true.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nailed
programme.desc: Just weeks before a witness is to testify against the man accused of sexually assaulting her, she is murdered in the front yard of her own home. Investigators immediately suspect her attacker, but they don't have enough evidence to prove his guilt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Zodiac
programme.desc: For six years, a serial killer prowled the streets of New York City. He wrote letters to police and The New York Post, indicating he would kill twelve people — one for each astrological sign.

programme.title: Forensic Files: True Lies
programme.desc: In the summer of 1986, Kathleen Lipscomb's body was found on a deserted road outside of San Antonio. Months and years passed, but the crime was never solved. Finally, a private investigator discovered Kathleen's diary.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bed of Deceit
programme.desc: A retired police officer is found dead with a single gunshot wound to the head. His wife says the motive was robbery, but later tells police he committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoke in your Eyes
programme.desc: A suspicious fire sweeps through an apartment, killing two young women. The cause of the fire and the identity of the victims are unclear, but a closer look at the scene reveals something hidden in the ashes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Flower Power
programme.desc: Two different men called police to report the same murder. Apparently, neither one knew that the other had called. The investigation uncovered even more unusual circumstances.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Past Lives
programme.desc: The body of a wealthy American businessman was found in his rental car. Teeth and bone fragments were the only remains. When the victim's wife files an insurance claim for $7 million, investigators seek the help of a renowned forensic anthropologist.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Web of Seduction
programme.desc: When investigators found Bruce Miller dead in the office of his junkyard business, the crime scene was almost pristine. But when a computer forensics expert examined computers owned by the victim's wife and her lover, he found all the evidence needed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Traces of Truth
programme.desc: A mysterious computer crash pushed a thriving manufacturing company to the brink of collapse, jeopardizing hundreds of employees' jobs. Forensic investigators must determine if the crash was the result of a computer defect, human error or sabotage.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Curve
programme.desc: It was supposed to be a routine motorcade for the Queen of England. But on the way to Yosemite National Park, a car carrying three Secret Service agents collided with a car driven by a deputy from the local sheriff's office.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Visibility Zero
programme.desc: In 1993, the Amtrak Railroad experienced the deadliest train crash in United States history when the Sunset Limited derailed while crossing Alabama's Big Bayou Canot bridge. 47 passengers and crew were killed; scores more were injured.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hack Attack
programme.desc: A mysterious computer crash pushed a thriving manufacturing company to the brink of collapse, jeopardizing hundreds of jobs. Forensic investigators had to determine if the crash was the result of a computer defect, human error, or sabotage.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Road Rage
programme.desc: Police investigate a discarded sleeping bag containing bloody sneakers and a purse, which eventually leads to the body of a young woman. A mark found on the victim's body enables police to track the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hunter or Hunted
programme.desc: A woman is killed while walking her dogs in the woods. Since she has no enemies and her husband has an alibi, police assume it's a hunting accident — until they find a strange letter, allegedly written by the woman before her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In Harm's Way
programme.desc: An Alaskan police officer finds a woman's body while on routine patrol of a public park. During the autopsy, the medical examiner preserves the portion of her rib cage which sustained the fatal wound.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Corpus Delicti
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace. Even though foul play is suspected, the leads don't pan out and the trail turns cold. Twenty years would pass before police are able to link a clump of hair discovered in an isolated area with the missing woman.

programme.title: Forensic Files: News at 11
programme.desc: When a talented television news anchor is shot to death outside her home, it appears to be a crime of passion perpetrated by an obsessed fan.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Desire
programme.desc: Investigators sift through the ashes of a fire which killed a 40-year-old woman. The fire appears to have been started by an unattended cigarette. On closer look, forensic scientists discover the cause was far more complicated.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cloak of Deceit
programme.desc: For seven years, a trio of men robbed one bank after another. They always got away before the police arrived and they left no evidence behind. But the way they stood and the clothes they wore told a story that could be read by forensic scientists.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Medicine
programme.desc: A young woman suddenly becomes critically ill, eventually leaving her unable to walk. A bone marrow test reveals the cause: arsenic poisoning. Investigators must determine if the poisoning was caused by groundwater contamination or something sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stick 'Em Up
programme.desc: Residents of Noel, Missouri were stunned to learn that their bank had been robbed and the bank president was missing. His body was later found floating in a lake, securely bound to a chair with duct tape.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Head Games
programme.desc: A young couple decided to celebrate their first wedding anniversary with a camping trip to Mount Hood. During the trip, the husband was shot and killed. Later, his wife told two different versions of the events which led to his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Making the Collar
programme.desc: The body of 16-year-old Leanne Tiernan was discovered nine months after she disappeared. Forensic scientists found clues that painted a virtual portrait of her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Financial Downfall
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman falls to her death from a cliff overlooking the ocean. Initially, investigators think it was a tragic accident. But after a forensic examination, police uncover a very different picture of what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Haunted by the disappearance of her mother, a young woman undertakes an investigation of her own. In her mother's diary, she discovers a dark family secret that might explain the disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over a Barrel
programme.desc: California police had several suspects in the robbery and brutal murder of an elderly couple. Ten years later, a determined forensic scientist used material from a dentist's office to uncover ballistic evidence that had been overlooked.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pinned by the Evidence
programme.desc: After a street fight takes the life of a national wrestling champion, police must determine if he was killed in cold blood or in self-defense.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cries Unheard
programme.desc: A 19-year-old woman was found dead in her car; the scene had been staged to make murder appear to be suicide. During their investigation, police discovered the victim was involved in a love quadrangle, giving several people a motive to kill her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Buried Treasure
programme.desc: A man disappears one year to the day after beginning an affair with his friend's wife. 15 years later, with the help of a metal detector, police find evidence that would prove what had happened and who was responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Betrayal
programme.desc: When the body of a young woman is found under an isolated highway ramp, a unique fiber on the victim's clothing leads San Diego police straight to the most unlikely of killers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Matrimony
programme.desc: A go-go dancer told her family she needed to get away for a while and then she simply disappeared. Investigators were suspicious, because she took neither her car nor her clothes. 20 years later, her family received a call that changed everything.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muddy Waters
programme.desc: A Colorado hunter is the victim of a well-planned crime. Investigators suspect two weapons and two killers. But forensic evidence points them in a different direction — one much closer to home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Point of Origin
programme.desc: In 1984, California firefighters battled ten arson fires in three weeks. When cigarettes and a scrap of paper connected the case to similar fires further north, the hunt was on for a dangerous pyromaniac.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeds for Doubt
programme.desc: In 2002, a small community in upstate New York was devastated when Patty Wlasiuk died in a truck accident. But burdock seed pods found in her hair and on her clothes indicated that this was no accident — it was cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Saving Face
programme.desc: When a woman disappeared without a trace, there were two possible explanations: kidnapping or murder. Careful investigation, a forensic artist and DNA profiling enabled police to find a single suspect, who was known to prey upon vulnerable women.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Northern Exposure
programme.desc: Alaskan hikers discover a body wrapped in sheets which were edged in orange stitching. Investigators find a tuft of red carpet fibers clinging to the sheet — threads of evidence which lead them straight to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Silk Stalkings
programme.desc: Prompted by news of a flight attendant's brutal murder, the son of a previous victim contacts police. Both murders have similar MOs, and biological evidence proves that these were serial killings.

programme.desc: This episode includes: RFK, Voice From the Grave, Update: Thanks Captain Sharp and No One Spared.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 11

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 15

programme.desc: En 24/7 kanal for folk som er nyskjerrige på mote og design! Supermodellen Heidi Klum er vert for denne spennende reality-serien som gir sultne, talentfulle designere sjansen til å vise frem sitt arbeid for New York.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Stranger
programme.desc: The body of a young woman found burned in a truck launched a manhunt to find her killer. When more bodies began to turn up across the country, the FBI believed the cases were linked. Investigators had a suspect. They just couldn't find him.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Manhunt
programme.desc: A killer was on the loose in one of America's most popular tourist destinations. Armed and desperate, he evaded law enforcement at every turn. As the Fourth of July weekend quickly approached, thousands of people became potential targets.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Crazy Don
programme.desc: To the FBI, he was believed to be the boss of New York's most powerful mafia organizationthe Genovese crime family. Was Gigante crazy or was his behavior a shrewd attempt to disguise his position as a ruthless mafia boss?

programme.title: The FBI Files: Killer Abroad
programme.desc: Beginning in 1990, Europe found itself in the clutches of a serial killer. He became an international outlaw, hopping from country to country to evade capture and to kill again.

programme.title: The FBI Files: .22 Caliber Killer
programme.desc: In Buffalo, New York, a sniper targeted African-American men. He held a city hostage, and threatened to ignite a racial powder keg. And it looked like others might be following his bloody example.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Unabomber
programme.desc: For nearly two decades a mathematical genius with delusions of single-handedly destroying industrial society, planted or mailed powerful bombs to unsuspecting innocent victims.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Held For Ransom
programme.desc: Wealth has its rewards, but it also brings its dangers. Kidnapping is one of them. No ordeal is more horrifying for a family than to have a child taken.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Paradise
programme.desc: It should have been Shangri-La, but when bad blood developed, piracy took over and the only law was the law of the jungle.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Millionaire Murder
programme.desc: A businessman went to Florida to make one last deal before he retired-he never returned home to his millions. Authorities examined who was closest to him and who stood to gain from his disappearance. But this time conventional rules didn't apply.

programme.title: The FBI Files: A Family Torn
programme.desc: The parents of 11 yr. old Brittany Martinez knew their daughter was no runaway. Something had happened to her, something terrible. When they failed to find Brittany in their quiet Illinois neighborhood, they called the police.

programme.title: The FBI Files: A Model Killer
programme.desc: It's a model's job to rivet the public's attention. But in 1984, some aspiring models began attracting publicity in a terrible new way.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Cracking The Cartel
programme.desc: A mother and child are kidnapped a bystander is murdered. Violence such as this shattered a quiet Texas neighborhood and exposed a drug cartel that flourished where it was least expected.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Dead Run
programme.desc: In Pennsylvania, an inmate escaped with the help of his female accomplice. Following a trail of fraudulent credit card receipts and deaths, authorities track the pair, but always find themselves one step behind.

programme.title: The FBI Files: First and Kennedy Street Crew
programme.desc: In the early 1990's, Washington, D.C., became the murder capital of the nation. Few were left untouched by gang violence, which was ignited by the drug trade. By 1994, that violence would strike at the very heart of law enforcement.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Coffee Shop Murders
programme.desc: At a coffee shop in Washington, DC, three employees were shot to death. Evidence at the crime scene pointed in many different directions. Was this a hate crime, a robbery gone wrong or an act of cold-blooded vengeance?

programme.title: The FBI Files: Dishonored
programme.desc: Shirley Russell was determined enough to reach the rank of Captain in the United States Marine Corps. When this officer turned up missing, her colleagues refused to believe she had gone AWOL. It was unclear whether Captain Shirley Russell was alive.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Evil Intent
programme.desc: Drops of blood and a torn screen were all that's left to tell authorities what happened to a woman in Indiana. The 21 yr. old victim was taken from her home on a spring morning. She appeared to have no real enemies, there was no clear motive.

programme.title: The FBI Files: A Stranger in Town
programme.desc: She appeared on the highway in the spring, a young woman, her life cut short, her past and her identity a mystery. Only by finding out who she was could we ever hope to find her killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Dead Wrong
programme.desc: Hiding a body can be difficult; it's sometimes easier to obscure or disguise the circumstances of the death, turning murder into suicide, or pinning the blame on someone else. The truth is told through subtle clues taken from the crime scene.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Vanished
programme.desc: In New York, an ambitious college student has her whole life ahead of her, until she crosses the path of a killer. It's a random murder, the hardest kind to solve.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Tainted Blood
programme.desc: The forces of nature can reduce a body to bones in a matter of weeks. Using a unique combination of art and science, forensic anthropologists give victims a face long after they have been forgotten.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Deadly Dealings
programme.desc: For a price, anything's possible. Contract killings arose out of the need to establish the perfect alibi. By hiring someone else to do the dirty work, a person can deflect guilt, at least in theory.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Trial Of The Century
programme.desc: Forensics in the O.J. Simpson Murder Trial: Millions watched on television as the jury rendered their verdict. Orenthal James Simpson was found not guilty of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives: In the Camera's Eye
programme.desc: Photography has long been a vital tool in homicide investigations. A single image captures enough information to identify a suspect, and to preserve a vital clue long after a witness' memory fades.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Signed In Blood
programme.desc: Handwriting Analysis: We've all heard that our handwriting tells more about our personalities than we think. Are we risk-takers, have low-esteem, fun loving, or are we capable of murder?

programme.title: The New Detectives: Lethal Encounter
programme.desc: In most homicides, police rely on motive to pursue a murderer. But when the killer is a stranger the crime may go unsolved for years. It takes a full arsenal of forensic techniques to trace a lethal encounter.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Natural Witness
programme.desc: The Great Outdoors may offer great clues to solving brutal murders. But it takes the keen eye of the forensic entomologist and botanist to decipher the clues nature provides.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Absent Witness
programme.desc: When killers hide or destroy the remains of their victims, it becomes the mission of forensic scientists to reconstruct the scenes and prove murder for an absent witness.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Medical Examiners's Casebook
programme.desc: Some killers choose to hide their victims. And investigators must then rely on forensic examiners to uncover proof of murder. These are just two extraordinary crimes that have made their way into the medical examiner's casebook.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Silent Killers
programme.desc: Weeks pass as forensic investigators search for even the smallest clues, only to find what they feared in their own backyard. In Canada, two people die suddenly of unknown causes, and their deaths may not be as coincidental as they first appear.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Body Count
programme.desc: Some people do get away with murder, at least for a while. Flush with their success, serial killers murder again and again. But each time they kill, they leave behind a few more clues, which ultimately lead to their undoing.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Lethal Obsessions
programme.desc: Some people will let nothing stand between them and their goals. In their tortured minds, raw desire replaces all reason, and homicide becomes a convenient means to an end.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Fatal Abduction
programme.desc: Anytime, anywhere, people disappear, kidnapped from their daily routines. Predators always leave clues behind, but chasing them takes time, hampering investigators' attempts to solve these fatal abductions.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Stolen Identity
programme.desc: When a theft is committed, something valuable is stolen. But when a criminal needs a new identity, theft becomes a matter of life and death.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Hidden Obsessions
programme.desc: In San Diego, California, a killer has left behind pieces of evidence. Detectives must sort through these small clues to prove murder.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Sinister Happenings at The Village Farm Museum Part 1
programme.desc: The team heads to Lincolnshire to investigate the Village Farm Museum. This location looks out of place, being in the middle of a residential housing estate.
programme.sub-title: Sinister Happenings at The Village Farm Museum Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Sinister Happenings at The Village Farm Museum Part 2
programme.desc: This fascinating location sees a twist in the activity with Bex and Sean getting more than they bargained for.
programme.sub-title: Sinister Happenings at The Village Farm Museum Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: Brookside
programme.desc: Multiple ghostly sightings have been reported that could be connected to the close, but what will Sean and Bex encounter during the day for a special Ghost Dimension Lock Down investigation?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Will it All Go Pear Shaped at Pear Mill? - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to Stockport to investigate a haunted mill, which has a lift with a mind all of its own. Will any of the ghosts haunting the mill join him on the investigation tonight or will it all go pear shaped?
programme.sub-title: Will it All Go Pear Shaped at Pear Mill? - Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Will it All Go Pear Shaped at Pear Mill? - Pear 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation of the mill and is attacked by a spirit. Jane joins the investigation with surprising results. Will it have a happy ending?
programme.sub-title: Will it All Go Pear Shaped at Pear Mill? - Pear 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Escape the Escape Room - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean enters one of the UK's most haunted escape rooms and it appears that he is not the only one trying to escape. Will the spirits play games with him tonight?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Escape the Escape Room - Part 2
programme.desc: The investigation continues at the escape room and a certain spirit attempts to tug at Sean's clothing. Will he finally survive the escape room?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Buried inside the Bombing Decoy
programme.desc: A Second World War bombing decoy site at Formby. It was commissioned in December 1940 as a 'Permanent Starfish' site to deflect enemy bombing from the city of Liverpool and it is now home to a whole host of paranormal activity.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Fun and Games at The Sportsman Inn
programme.desc: Bex, Sean and Paul, investigate claims of paranormal incidents inside of a haunted inn. Once three separate cottages, will any of the previous residents join the investigation tonight? Or is there something more sinister haunting here?
programme.sub-title: Fun and Games at The Sportsman Inn

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: A Poltergeist Nightmare at 30 East Drive
programme.desc: The team step into a house that has become a legend with the paranormal community, 30 East Drive, Pontefract.
programme.sub-title: A Poltergeist Nightmare at 30 East Drive

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: The Club
programme.desc: One haunted members only club and a bar full if spirits. Ghost Dimension capture ghostly goings on, inside of Aintree Conservative Club. A place never investigated before and has paranormal activity daily.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: House of Fear
programme.desc: Located in Gran Canaria, there is one house that locals refuse to enter and that is, The House of Fear. Ghostly shadows, loud banging and demonic voices have all been reported here and the Ghost Dimension team will investigate these claims tonight.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Last Orders at The Fleece Inn
programme.desc: The team heads to Elland to investigate ghostly-goings on in this haunted pub. It's not just the spirits behind the bar lurking here. Multiple hauntings, murders and death surround this public house.
programme.sub-title: Last Orders at The Fleece Inn

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Souls Seeking Solace Gotts Park Mansion
programme.desc: The team encounters a spirit member joining them on the thermal imaging camera and appearing to leave its ghostly hand print behind.
programme.sub-title: Souls Seeking Solace Gotts Park Mansion

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Underground World Of The City of Caves
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team ventures underground to investigate the City of Caves in Nottingham.
programme.sub-title: Underground World Of The City of Caves

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Dangerous Demon of The Stork Inn
programme.desc: Sean heads to Wigan to investigate a location with history dating back to 900AD. Encountering a spirit that attacks him, will the team be safe tonight as they come face to face with pure evil?
programme.sub-title: Dangerous Demon of The Stork Inn

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Buried Beneath The Bowling Green
programme.desc: Buried under the location Sean investigates tonight, is the bones of the deceased and it appears that they are at unrest. Will Sean solve the mystery of who is haunting this location?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Demons on The Buses
programme.desc: Hidden in St Helens, is a museum that is home to demonic and dark entities trapped inside of vehicles.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Not a Very Fun Day at The Beech Caves
programme.desc: Witchcraft, demons and ghosts have all been reported to haunt these caves. Sean investigates this network of tunnels deep underground and uncovers that all is not as it seems. This is not a day out at the seaside at Beech Caves.
programme.sub-title: Not a Very Fun Day at The Beech Caves

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: DNA Shockers
programme.desc: Monique and Ashley find out who their newborn babies' fathers are on today's Steve Wilkos Show!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: This Should Be Explosive...
programme.desc: Katrina believes her sister Kendra’s boyfriend is a cheater and having sex with her best friend Nay-Nay! Later, John returns to the stage with a shocking update!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Do You Need a Medic or Are You Guilty?
programme.desc: Michelle needs answers about who hurt her daughter. She will stop at nothing to protect her baby. Will the father James clear his name on Steve's stage?
programme.sub-title: Do You Need a Medic or Are You Guilty?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: DNA: Don't Run From the Results
programme.desc: Roberta suspects that her husband Bryan has been cheating. They both believe the other is cheating. Find out whether these men are really the father on today's Steve Wilkos!
programme.sub-title: DNA: Don't Run From the Results

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: He Said Give Your Baby Away and You Did
programme.desc: Shannan claims Tim fathered her child. He doesn't buy it because he doesn't recall having sex with her! Later, Ayana is furious that her boyfriend Patrick denies their son!
programme.sub-title: He Said Give Your Baby Away and You Did

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I'm a Survivor, but I Can't Take This
programme.desc: Is Khadisa's boyfriend Chad cheating on her with her own sister? Will Maya's ex trust her and her current beau with their infant son?
programme.sub-title: I'm a Survivor, but I Can't Take This

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Your Kids Need Their Mom, But You Chose Him
programme.desc: Will Nadia and Woody's lie detector test results prove that they were negligent and deserved to lose custody of their children? Then, can Steve set the record straight about Josette's daughter?
programme.sub-title: Your Kids Need Their Mom, But You Chose Him

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: The 1,000th Episode!
programme.desc: On the 1,000th episode, we'll bring you all of the crazy confessions, explosive meltdowns, chair throws, funny moments and the heartfelt stories that have made this show special!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Saw Right Through You
programme.desc: Today on Steve Wilkos, Maurice wants to prove to his girlfriend that he's faithful. Plus Chuanhtee says fed up with Ladi's cheating accusations! Watch as the truth is revealed!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Have Two Husbands
programme.desc: Jessica married Gian after a five-month relationship. With a baby on the way, everything seems to be going great for the couple, except Jessica is married to another man, Michael!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: An Explosive DNA Story
programme.desc: Teneal and Richard are telling different tales, each alleging the other is unfit to parent! The truth will come down to a lie detector test, and the results will be shocking!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve, I Can't Face The Truth.
programme.desc: Today Danny is finally ready to face the missing man in his life and get answers to lifelong questions. Steven offers a number of excuses for not seeing his son, but can he redeem himself?
programme.sub-title: Steve, I Can't Face The Truth.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did You Murder My Daughter?
programme.desc: Two years ago, Latisha and her boyfriend were found shot to death in their car. Latisha’s mother Nancy believes her ex-husband Kenneth was involved. Who is responsible for their deaths?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Got a 14 Year Old Pregnant
programme.desc: Megan is 14 and pregnant with 19 year old Michael’s baby, but he doesn’t see any problems with this situation. Laurie, Megan’s mother, turns to Steve to help get through to her!
programme.sub-title: I Got a 14 Year Old Pregnant

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve, Get Him Out!
programme.desc: Kelly’s ex-husband Nikki continues to haunt her. He went to jail for killing her 2 week old son and is now dating her 18 year old daughter! Can Steve get Nikki out of their lives forever?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: A Mother in Denial
programme.desc: When ordinary people need help, Steve Wilkos is ready to answer the call. Watch as Steve helps ordinary people stand up for themselves and fight for what he believes in order to promote justice for all.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: A Mother's Rage
programme.desc: Three years later, Elizabeth still carries strong doubts about Manny's intentions with her family and her husband Rodney is caught in the middle. Is Manny innocent?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Mommy Hurt Me
programme.desc: Stephanie’s drug addiction led her to neglect and abuse her kids. Scott’s fiancée stepped up as a mother and Stephanie failed multiple drug tests, he doesn’t want her near the kids, but wants her to atone for her wrongs!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Who’s Hurting My Granddaughter?
programme.desc: Maria claims that her son’s ex Amy and her new boyfriend Brian are abusing and neglecting her granddaughter. But Amy says Maria is a racist and angry over raising her grandchild in a Hispanic home!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: What Happened to My Baby?
programme.desc: Baby Garrett died of an oxycodone drug overdose while in Sharon’s care. His mother Casey left him with Sharon so she could visit her husband Kenneth in the hospital. Who’s responsible?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Wait! Don't Read The Results Yet Steve...
programme.desc: Sharina thinks that Clarence is cheating on her because he’s always out late. Plus, Chrystal doesn’t want Earnie’s ex Tenyia to live with them just because she’s the mother of his child.
programme.sub-title: Wait! Don't Read The Results Yet Steve...

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Is My Husband the Abuser?
programme.desc: Joyia is desperate to keep her friend Stephanie from going back to her problematic ex Scott. But she still loves him! Will she have the strength to leave him?

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Loose Cannon
programme.desc: In the dead of night, a shooter on a rampage rips through a home, leaving a grandmother disfigured, her 24 year old daughter dead, and a two year-old child clinging to life.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Death Grip
programme.desc: When a speeding truck crashes into a residential building, officers find the lifeless body of Michael Faast behind the wheel. But he didn’t die in the wreck – he was shot point-blank in the temple.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: After School Special
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes when a beloved teacher is poisoned in her classroom. As doctors fight to save Barbara Lewis’ life, Lt. Joe Kenda and his team delve into her personal affairs.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: 12 Years a Fugitive
programme.desc: When a beloved grandmother is found stabbed to death in her own home, Kenda must turn to a tight-knit community still grieving from the tragic loss.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Poker Face
programme.desc: A group of friends discover the corpse of entrepreneur Jamie Foster hidden under a blanket. Kenda e discovers that Foster’s business put him in close quarters with a host of unsavory characters.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Uninvited Guest
programme.desc: A soldier is stabbed to death at a drive-thru. Kenda’s only clue is that this is somehow tied to a breakdancing competition.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Who Took Heather?
programme.desc: A 13-year-old girl is missing, sending Kenda’s city into a panic. A cryptic letter to the District Attorney’s office suggests the girl isn’t the only victim.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bad Blood
programme.desc: A army vet is found bleeding to death on the asphalt of a parking lot -- his chest littered with too many knife wounds to count. Kenda’s case is stuck in first gear until a gruesome clue appears.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The End
programme.desc: Kenda faces his most difficult case yet – the slaying of a young boy. The detective makes the most consequential decision of his career.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: When the Music Stops
programme.desc: Vietnam War veteran Charles Walker is found unconscious, after a stabbing attack so savage even 45 units of blood couldn’t save his life.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Monster Awakes
programme.desc: When Julie Smith reports being sexually assaulted, Lt. Joe Kenda and his Sex Crimes Unit discover a terrifying similarity to other attacks on the east side of town.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Last Fare
programme.desc: A young man is found dead behind the wheel of his taxi. With robbery seeming unlikely, Kenda and Gaenzle wonder if this was personal.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Six Feet Under
programme.desc: Kenda finds the body of a bruised and battered young woman named Vicki Ross strangled. Kenda must sort through the endless suspicious characters in Vicki's past to find the elusive truth.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Blood From A Stone
programme.desc: A bystander receives a deadly head injury during a roadside altercation, but the stakes are raised when his body disappears from the scene. When a toddler is kidnapped for ransom Kenda joins forces with an undercover team in a desperate race against time.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Eyes of a Child
programme.desc: A loving, churchgoing grandmother is found stabbed to death in her apartment, leaving Joe Kenda to wonder what sort of monster could do such a thing.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: City Of Fear
programme.desc: When a spate of violent robberies spreads terror across the city, Kenda and the major crimes unit are called in to bring the masked gunman to justice.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Setup
programme.desc: Douglas Warren stumbles into a downtown bar with a gunshot wound to the neck and bleeds out on the floor. Kenda must conduct a risky sting operation and launch an interstate manhunt.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Dead Weight
programme.desc: A seemingly random attack leaves Mary Moebus dead, and police flummoxed by a daunting field of suspects. But when Lt Joe Kenda uncovers a cache of new evidence, he realizes someone’s been lying.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lady in Red
programme.desc: A woman in red drops a dying man off at a firehouse… and then vanishes. Identifying the mystery woman is the hurdle Kenda must overcome in order to bring him justice.

programme.title: The Hills: Hi Lauren, It's Spencer
programme.desc: Lauren er usikker på om hun skal gå i Heidis bryllup etter at Spencer endelig har bedt om unnskyldning. Brody nekter å risikere forholdet sitt til Jayde for å redde vennskapet med Audrina, og Stephanie konfronterer Kelly Cutrone.

programme.title: The Hills: Something Old, Something New
programme.desc: I Laurens siste episode må hun bestemme om hun er villig til å tilgi Spencer for å kunne stille opp for Heidi i hennes "prinsesse"-bryllup. Hele besetningen dukker opp og blir overrasket over en gjest ingen tenkte ville komme.

programme.title: The Hills: It's On Bitch
programme.desc: Kristin starter krig når hun forsøker seg på Justin foran Audrina. Spencer og Heidi leter etter hus, og Spencer kjøper et hus uten Heidis godkjennelse.

programme.title: The Hills: Mess With Me, I Mess With You
programme.desc: Etter at Audrina ikke dukket opp, bestemmer Kristin seg for ikke å kjempe mot sine følelser for Justin. Heidi melder seg som barnevakt for naboen, men Spencer vil ikke ha noe med unger å gjøre.
programme.sub-title: Mess With Me, I Mess With You

programme.title: The Hills: Strike One
programme.desc: Kristin får smake på hvordan det er å ha et forhold til Justin når han ikke dukker opp på Brodys overraskelsesfest. Heidi og Spencer er uenige om når de skal starte familie, og Audrina dater Justins bestevenn.

programme.title: The Hills: Old Habits Die Hard
programme.desc: Kristin tror hun har temmet Justin, men kanskje er han fortsatt ikke over Audrina. Når Holly mister kontrollen på en tilstelning, er det Heidis jobb å få søsteren til å innrømme alkoholproblemet sitt.

programme.title: The Hills: Sorry Boo, Strike Two
programme.desc: Justin gjør seg kostbar med Kristin, men biter seg i halen. Hollys drikking fører til at Heidi og Stephanie må gripe inn. Brody og Jayde krangler slik at de må revurdere forholdet sitt.

programme.title: The Hills: I'm Done With You
programme.desc: Justin går på glør etter at Kristin og Audrina endelig møtes ansikt til ansikt. Alt Heidi ønsker seg til bursdag er en baby, men Spencer har helt andre planer.

programme.title: The Hills: On To The Next
programme.desc: Kristin og Brody vurderer å date igjen, men når de støter på Jayde forstår de at tiden ikke er moden. Audrina og Justin møtes for å diskutere framtiden, men det ender ikke som hun håpet. Spencer går drastisk til verks mot Heidis babybesettelse.

programme.title: The Hills: Can't Always Get What You Want
programme.desc: Kristin støter sammen med Jayde når hun kommer for å gjenerobre Brody. Heidi legger en plan for å bli gravid med eller uten Spencers samtykke, og Audrina må takle at Justin fortsatt har følelser for Kristin.
programme.sub-title: Can't Always Get What You Want

programme.title: The Hills: Mr. Right Now
programme.desc: Kristin vil ikke ha Justin, men han gir henne ikke opp så lett. Audrina avslutter forholdet til Justin for godt. Brody får kalde føtter når Jayde vil flytte inn hos ham, og Spencer frykter at Heidi muligens kan være gravid.

programme.title: The Hills: The Boys Of Summer
programme.desc: Kristin og Justin vil gå videre med forholdet, og Spencer konfronterer Heidi med graviditetstesten. Brody har kanskje fortsatt følelser for Kristin etter at Jayde konfronterer ham med tilstanden til deres forhold på en forlovelsesfest.

programme.title: The Hills: Put On A Happy Face
programme.desc: Heidis hjemkomst blir ødelagt når moren hennes misliker hennes plastisk kirurgi. Kristin og jentene drar til Miami for Super Bowl-helgen, men det blir dårlig stemning når den harde festingen hennes begynner å bekymre Audrina, Lo og Stephanie.

programme.title: The Hills: Rumor Has It
programme.desc: Når ryktene begynner å spres om Kristins festing, får Stephanie skylden. Audrina starter å date en ny fyr, men det stopper ikke Brody fra å prøve seg på henne. Spencer blir opprørt når han møter på Stephanie på Kristins fest.

programme.title: The Hills: The Elephant In The Room
programme.desc: Heidi arrangerer en fest for naboen hennes, men det blir overskygget av at Spencer blir sint på Holly. Kristin oppfordrer Audrina til å forplikte seg til Ryan, og prøver deretter å komme nærmere Brody.

programme.title: The Hills: This Is Goodbye
programme.desc: Heidi og Spencers oppførsel fører til at deres venner og familie tar et vanskelig valg. Kristin og Brody roter, men er enige om å fortsette som single. Ryan skuffer Audrina når han ikke dukker opp for en kveld på byen.

programme.title: The Hills: A New Bird
programme.desc: Brody risikerer sitt vennskap med Kristin når han begynner å date ei annen jente. Lo setter Stephanie opp på en dobbeldate. Ryan gir Audrinas venner en ny sjanse.

programme.title: The Hills: Ghost From The Past
programme.desc: Kristin sliter med å gå videre etter Brody. Audrina møter på Justin og begynner å tvile på sitt forhold til Ryan. Lo blir venn med Brodys nye kjæreste.

programme.title: The Hills: The Company You Keep
programme.desc: Brodys nye flamme gjør en fiende av Kristin når hun tar med seg en gammel rival av Kristins på en fest. Ryan kommer tilbake fra turneen, men Audrina forteller ham ikke at hun møtte Justin mens han var borte.

programme.title: The Hills: Between A Rocker And A Hard Place
programme.desc: Audrinas forhold til Ryan blir satt på prøve når han møter Justin for første gang. Brody er på Kristins side når Allie krangler med henne. Stephanie har en skuffende andre date.
programme.sub-title: Between A Rocker And A Hard Place

programme.title: The Hills: Break-Up to Make-Up
programme.desc: Akkurat da Audrina avslutter ting med Ryan, overrasker Justin henne på bursdagen hennes. McKaelas venn Allie lager mer trøbbel med Kristin. Brody forteller Justin hva han tenker.

programme.title: The Hills: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: På en surfetur til Costa Rica, gjør Kristin Brody sjalu ved å rote med en lokal bartender, Audrina prøver å bekjempe hennes tiltrekning til Justin, og Stephanie finner seg selv på kant med jungelmiljøet.

programme.title: The Hills: Loves Me Not
programme.desc: Kristin har en åpenthjertig samtale med Brody, hun ønsker å gi forholdet en ny sjanse. Heidis mor kommer til LA, i håp om å forsone seg med henne. Lo og kjæresten hennes feirer sitt jubileum, og Stephanie begynner å date en ny.

programme.title: The Hills: All Good Things...
programme.desc: Kristin står overfor en stor avgjørelse som også påvirker Brody. Audrina slår opp med Justin. Lo vet ikke om hun er klar til å ta neste skritt med hennes kjæreste og Stephanie mener hun har endelig funnet sann lykke.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: I Don't Hold Grudges... JK!
programme.desc: Det er en ny begynnelse for den ikoniske vennegruppen da de kommer tilbake til The Hills og tar opp kontakten etter mange år. Nye utfordringer, gamle feider og romanser kolliderer. Fortiden er nemlig ikke alltid i fortiden.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: You're Not My Family
programme.desc: Stephanie forsøker å reparere forholdet til boren, Spencer. Mischa treffer Perez Hilton, som mobbet henne da hun var skuespiller. Gnisten mellom Audrina og Justin fortsetter å ulme, men Justin kan ha fått øye for noen annen også.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: A Legend in His Own Mind
programme.desc: Audrina får sjokkerende informasjon om Justin Bobby, og tvinges til å etterprøve motivene hans. Sinnene koker når Spencer og Heidi stiller spørsmålstegn ved sitt forhold til Brody. Brandon Thomas Lee arrangere en bassengfest hos sin mor.
programme.sub-title: A Legend in His Own Mind

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: Not to Eavesdrop, But to Eavesdrop
programme.desc: Audrina konfronterer Justin med at han nektet å ha kysset henne. Brody klager over forholdet til faren, til Caitlyn, og sin forhenværende bestevenn, Spencer. Spencer og Heidis forhold settes på prøve når de kjemper med å få firmaet til å vokse.
programme.sub-title: Not to Eavesdrop, But to Eavesdrop

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: Playing with Fire
programme.desc: Gjengen drar til Vegas for å se Brodys DJ-forestilling. Justin finner seg plutselig midt i en konfrontasjon mellom Audrina og Stephanie. Storbrann herjer gjennom Malibu, og Kaitlynn frykter for Brodys liv når han blir værende i evakueringssonen.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: I Don't Think We Can Be Friends
programme.desc: Brody og Kaitlynn håndterer det ødeleggende etterspillet av Malibu-brannene. Audrina fatter et vanskelig valg om Justin. Samtidig har Mischa en prøvespilling med høy innsats for en filmrolle. Heidi begynner å gjenopplive popstjerne karrieren.
programme.sub-title: I Don't Think We Can Be Friends

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: You're Enemy #1
programme.desc: Sladderen tar fyr og ryktene går etter en skandaløs hendelse med Brody og Stephanie. Audrina blir sjokkert da Justin tar med en hakesleppende date til middagen.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: Are We Exclusive?
programme.desc: Kaitlynn & Brody's 'A-liste'-galla splitter gruppen når hun ekskluderer deler av gjengen. Audrina overrasker alle med en nytenning av en lidenskapelig romanse med en gammel flamme. Spencer forbløffer Heidi med en overdådig overraskelse.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: This Hangover Better Be Expensive
programme.desc: Forholdet til Brody og Kaitlynn er stadig anstrengende og de går til en fertilitetsspesialist. Heidi og Spencer forbereder seg for sin kommende wow-fornyelse med duellerende utdrikningslag. Brandon har vanskelig for å definere det nye forholdet.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: Love Triangle
programme.desc: Kaz og Theo skværer opp, men for hvor lenge? Kori og Sofie blir nærere, men så setter KC inn et støt og Nathan hisser seg opp av en avsløring!

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: SOS
programme.desc: En ny kjendis ankommer og truer Sofie og Kori. Kaz kjemper stadig med å bo med eksen sin, Theo. Nathan og Tommy gjør opp. Hemmelighullet avsløres, mye til KCs skrekk.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: Secret Kisses
programme.desc: Michael er KCs eks, og er tilbake fra Hemmelighullet Han rører alle med sin oppriktige unnskyldning. Kori og Elle blir nærmere mens Theo og KC tar et hemmelig kyss, bare for å krangle på ekte 'Ex On The Beach'-måte.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: Loose Lips
programme.desc: Michael Goonans hemmelige oppdrag avsløres i hemmelighullet, men kan sladderen bite ham i ræva. En eks betyr problemer for Kori, og Ella og KC får grønt lys fra Kaz.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: True Colours
programme.desc: Michael Goonan sender hjem noen, og blir så urolig for sin egen besøkelsestid. KC syns stadig det er vanskelig å være med Theo når Kaz er der. Nathan tar farvel med Tommy før han blir sendt til stranden for å ta imot den neste eksen.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: Kori Gets the Hump
programme.desc: Lockie og Megan deler sitt første kyss. Kori blir forvirret av Sofies doble signaler. Nathan frykter at Declan kan ombestemme seg.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: Double Whammy
programme.desc: Kori og Lockie rammes av dobbel motgang, og SOS betyr trøbbel for kjendisene. Nathans usikkerhet blir en fordel, og Mike blir overrasket.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: Theo's 'Down Under' Dilemma
programme.desc: Theo er knust etter at Kaz dro, og hans forhold med KC tilspisser seg. Lockie og Sofie krangler, og en ny eks gir oppstyr.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: The Cherry On The Cake
programme.desc: Anya liker Kori, men er Kori ferdig med Sofie? En splitter ny kjendis attraherer noen. OG-ene i villaen må fatte et tøft valg. Og en Pride-fest avslører en gullkrukke der regnbuen slutter.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: Going Going Gone!
programme.desc: En eks som truer med å endre Megan, ankommer. Kris avslører sine følelser for Ella. Kori og Sofie har en real styrkeprøve. Nathan må fatte en stor avgjørelse når tiden til en OG er over!

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: The Finale!
programme.desc: Nok en eks truer to av kjendisparene. SOS leverer sin endelige sexbombe. Den siste middagen gir en stor overraskelse. Blir det en lykkelig slutt eller ender alt i tårer?

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Paradise From Hell
programme.desc: 10 realitykjendiser tror de er på en sexy heisatur, men paradiset blir et mareritt når eksene deres begynner å dukke opp fra stranden (utover andre overraskelser) for å ødelegge hyggen. Tennes gamle flammer eller åpnes gamle sår?

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Being Shady 101
programme.desc: Den tiende single ankommer huset og lander midt i et trekantdrama. Farrah irriterer de hun bor sammen med. En eks sprer et skittent rykte når sårede følelser forvandles til hevngjerninger.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Simon Says
programme.desc: Farrah får en stor overraskelse i Shack of Secrets. En eks til en eks ruinerer en spirende romanse og avslører noen løgner. Den første eksen sendes hjem.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Worst Date Ever
programme.desc: To ekser slår seg sammen for å knuse Maya og gjengen hennes. En uventet overraskelse setter et av husets sterkeste par i fare.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Jay Is For Jealous
programme.desc: Huset feirer at Farrah er tilbake. Sjalusi fører til fysisk konfrontasjon da en intim sannhet blir avslørt. Noe uventet skjer ved elimineringen.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Low Blows
programme.desc: En etterlengtet eks ankommer, spenning som har småputret lenge eksploderer omsider og starter en voldsom krangel. Farrah trenger seg på andres anliggender, noe som fører til enda mer kaos i huset.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Revenge is Sweet
programme.desc: Handlinger får konsekvenser når eksene får høre om de mindre pene tingene singlene sa om dem. Jays usikkerhet rundt Morgans mange ekser når kokepunktet.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Here Comes Trouble
programme.desc: Et stormende forhold blir turbulent når den slemme Angela kommer tilbake for å røre i gryta og stjele noen menn. Huset tar helt av når en dyrefest går skeis.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Un-Bear-Able
programme.desc: Murrays tvilsomme fortid avsløres endelig. Husets sterkeste og rareste par konfronterer sitt første eks-hinder. Janelle får se konsekvensene av sine handlinger.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1990 Mitsubishi Mirage
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Antwons Mitsubishi Mirage. Antwon ruller hjem på 18-tommersdekk og med et akvarium i baksetet.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1967 Ford Mustang
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper West Coast Customs Marys Ford Mustang. Bilen hennes utstyres med det aller nyeste innen flatskjerm-tv.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1985 Ford Ranger
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Jareds Ford Ranger. Jared ruller i vei tre tommer lavere, nylakkert i metallic oransje.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Pontiac Trans Am
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper West Coast Customs Danelles Pontiac Trans Am. Hun triller i vei i en bil utstyrt med kaffetrakter og krystallkrone.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1974 Chevy Luv
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper gjengen fra West Coast Customs Neils Chevrolet LUV Truck. Han triller av gårde i et campingtelt på hjul.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1989 Ford Mustang
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper gjengen fra West Coast Customs Shondas Ford Mustang Convertible. Hun ruller i vei i et pimpet og helt trafikksikkert kjøretøy.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Maxima Station Wagon
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Ezras Nissan Maxima Station Wagon. Han kjører av gårde i en mobil DJ-bås.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Volkswagen Baja
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Krissys Volkswagen Baja Bug. Boblen fra 1969 ble konstruert med holdbarhet som mål. Men med sitt bøyde eksosrør og sine ødelagte dører, kan den virkelig beskrives som alt annet enn akkurat det.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1987 Honda CRX
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Brians Honda CRX. Det er den første bilen som får en splitter ny motor, ettersom den gamle dør innen Xzibit får den inn på verkstedet.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: '72 Landcruiser
programme.desc: Gaby var en nylig dumpet yogainstruktør som ikke hadde noe i verden utenom yogamatten sin og sin Land Cruiser fra 1972. Ekskjæresten solgte bilen til henne for 200 dollar. Gutta begynner å jobbe med utsiden...

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1989 Ford Escort
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper gjengen fra West Coast Customs Kerrys Ford Escort. Bilen var blitt sveiset og "limt sammen" av to separate biler. Gjengen mente den var trafikkfarlig...

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: Xzibit takes a beat-up 1984 Cadillac Eldorado and restores it to it's former glory.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, Xzibit and the boys at West Coast Customs transform a '91 Ford Escort into a European luxury mobile.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride

programme.title: Pimp My Ride

programme.title: Pimp My Ride

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: When Xzibit rolls on into the garage with the Fairlane, the boys can't believe their eyes. So they decide to give West his Fairlane back to tinker with and get him a brand-new pimped Toyota 4Runner.

programme.title: iCarly: iQ
programme.desc: Carly vil imponere en ny fyr ved å prøve å virke smartere enn hun er. Og gjengen prøver å finne et nytt sted å bo til T-Bo, etter at han har blitt kastet ut av Groovy Smoothie.

programme.title: iCarly: Møtet med førstedamen
programme.desc: Et føderalt bureau begynner å undersøke iCarly-gjengen etter at de hacker seg inn på et sikkerhetsnettverk for å holde nettfødselsdag for Carlys far. Gjestestjerne - Michelle Obama.

programme.title: iCarly: Billetten
programme.desc: Gjengen, minus Carly, tar med Sam til Canadian Fat Cake-fabrikken, men oppdager så at Sam ikke får komme tilbake inn i USA. I mens får Carly bekymringer i badekaret når hun gjør seg klar til daten sin.

programme.title: iCarly: Turen til Yakima
programme.desc: Etter å ha blitt disset i et intervju om iCarly, prøver Freddie å vise sin kreative side gjennom å webb-sende iCarly i 3D. Spencer ansetter en assistent som han ikke har råd til å betale.

programme.title: iCarly: Tabber
programme.desc: Christopher Cane, skuespilleren som spiller Rex on Victorious, venner tilbake som vert i et dyptgående intervju med stjernerne fra iCarly og viser deres supergøyale tabber og bortklipte scener. Gjestestjerne: Rex fra Victorious

programme.title: iCarly: Fortsatt like gal
programme.desc: Ettr å ha fått beskjed om at Nora Dershlit blir løslatt fra fengselet, ser iCarly-gjengen på hva de kan gjøre for å holde sin gamle kidnapper bak lås og slå. Imens oppdager Freddies mor den virkelige T-Bo.

programme.title: iCarly: iCarly møter One Direction
programme.desc: Carly får en smittsom sykdom og kommer til å smitte et medlem i bandet One Direction. I mens skal Spencer trene en liten jente som ikke kan fordra å morsjonere.

programme.title: iCarly: Restauranten
programme.desc: Gibby åpner en hemmelig restaurant i skolens kjeller med Sams hjelp. Og Spencer designer en sikkerhetsrobot til hjemmebruk, som plutselig mister fokus helt.

programme.title: iCarly: Aprilsnarr
programme.desc: I dette spesielle aprilsnarr-avsnittet blir Carly og Spencer satt på gaten, så gjengen sitter og tenker tilbake på sin tid i Bushwell Plaza. Men minnene deres stemmer kanskje ikke alltid helt med hvordan vi husker hendelsene.

programme.title: iCarly: Dårlig stemning i butikken
programme.desc: Freddies nye drømmejobb i Pear Store blir et mareritt når Sam også blir ansatt. Imens prøver Carly å bli inviteret ut av en fra Pear Store, og Spencer må melde seg til frivillig jobb på den lokale brannstasjonen.

programme.title: iCarly: Halloween
programme.desc: iCarly-gjengen holder en "Halfoween"-fest, for de syns at det skal være Halloween to ganger i året. Men da en forkledd gjest spiller Carly og vennene et puss, blir festen litt for vill.

programme.title: iCarly: Chucks lillebror
programme.desc: Et sinna barn ønsker inderlig å hevne seg, men målskiven Spencer prøver iherdig å stoppe ham. Gibby blir knust når hans nye lekelaserpistol går i stykker, men blir fra seg av henrykkelse når Freddies reparsjion gir den overraskende krefter.

programme.title: iCarly: Utestengt
programme.desc: Når Carly bannlyser T-Bo fra hennes og Spencers hjem, hevner han seg ved å ikke slippe Carly inn på Groovy Smoothie. Imens oppdager Freddie og Gibby at det fins mange fordeler ved å spille i band...og også et par ulemper.

programme.title: iCarly: Turen til Las Vegas
programme.desc: Når Sam får vite at moren hennes er i fengsel i Vegas, bestemmer gjengen seg for å ta sine mest verdifulle eiendeler, kjøre til Vegas og pantsette dem - så de får nok penger til å betale borgen for henne. Gjesteartister: History Channels PAWN STARS.

programme.title: iCarly: Nattsynbrillene
programme.desc: Sams venn kommer ut av ungdomsfengselet, og Sam advarer alle om å holde seg unna, men Carly hører ikke etter og havner på dypt vann. Hjemme i leiligheten finner Spencer noen nattsynbriller.

programme.title: iCarly: Verden er rystet del 1
programme.desc: Jimmy Fallon inviterer iCarly-gjengen til å opptre live i programmet sitt i New York. De elsker New York og er kjempeglade for å være med i programmet, men alt kan skje på live tv.

programme.title: iCarly: Verden er rystet del 2
programme.desc: Jimmy Fallon inviterer iCarly-gjengen til å opptre live i programmet sitt i New York, men en stor klesmiss fra Gibby betyr store problemer for nettshowets fremtid.

programme.title: iCarly: Spencers venner
programme.desc: iCarly-gjengen vil finne venner til Spencer på hans egen alder. De finner noen gode muligheter, men vil vennskapet blomstre?

programme.title: iCarly: Den stjålne laptoppen
programme.desc: Når Sams laptop blir stjålet, prøver iCarly-gjengen å hjelpe henne med å oppspore tyven. Imens får Spencer vite at han ikke får komme inn i sin yndlingsspillehall hvis han ikke er i følge med et barn. Hellet snur når Guppy trenger barnevakt.

programme.title: iCarly: Farvel del 2
programme.desc: Carly er på vei til å akseptere at hun ikke kan gå på det årlige ballet, da faren hennes dukker opp og går sammen med henne. Kvelden tar en uventet vending når faren hennes stiller et livsavgjørende spørsmål.

programme.title: iCarly: Vårt eget webshow
programme.desc: Når Miss Briggs avviser alle yndlingsdeltagerne deres fra uttakene til talenshowet, bestemmer Carly og Sam seg for å lage sitt eget talentshow for klassekameratene gjennom iCarly på nettet.

programme.title: iCarly: Herr Nesten Perfekt
programme.desc: Carly er keen på en gutt på skolen som heter Jake. Han er råkul og kjekk, og fordi hun liker ham, inviterer hun Jake til å spille gitar og synge på sitt nye webshow. Men hun oppdager forsent at Jake synger helt forferdelig.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg vil ha flere seere
programme.desc: Carly og Sam konkurrerer med Freddie og Spencer om å finne den beste planen for hvordan å få flere ungdommer til å se på iCarlys websendinger. Når alle planene deres slår helt feil, blir alt helt sprøtt.

programme.title: iCarly: En pågående kritiker
programme.desc: Carly, Sam og Freddie vil at web-showet deres skal bli anmeldt av 'Nevelocity', en populær webside for slike anmeldelser. Carly drar for å møte Nevel, og det viser seg at han er en irriterende gutt som vil date henne.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg vil bli hos Spencer
programme.desc: Bestefaren til Carly og Spencer kommer på overraskelsesvisitt. Han tror at Spencer er for uansvarlig til å passe på Carly. Carly og vennene hennes må bevise overfor bestefaren at Spencer er i stand til det.

programme.title: iCarly: Rekordforsøket
programme.desc: Carly, Sam og Freddie prøver å slå verdensrekorden for den lengste sammenhengende nettvideovisningen. For å klare det, må iCarly gå i over 24 timer i ett kjør.

programme.title: iCarly: En date med Freddie
programme.desc: Valerie er iCarly-fan og ber Freddie på date. Daten går så bra at Freddie begynner å filme Valeries eget webshow. Men når hennes webshow kommer i veien for iCarly, får Freddie problemer.

programme.title: iCarly: En lidenskapelig amatør
programme.desc: Carly inviterer Spencers kunsthelt, Harry Joyner, for å se på Spencers arbeid. Når Harry kaller Spensers ting amatørmessige, føler Spencer at livet har mistet all mening.

programme.title: iCarly: iCarlys største fan
programme.desc: iCarlys største fan, Mandy, blir invitert til showet som enslig studiopuplikum. Mandy viser seg å være mer av en forfølger enn et fan, og de blir nødt til å kvitte seg med henne.

programme.title: iCarly: Kyllinger på rømmen
programme.desc: Carly og Sam starter med å klekke ut kyllinger for et naturfagprosjekt. Kyllingene klekkes tidligere enn ventet og rømmer fra inkubatoren. Nå må Carly, Sam, Freddie og Spencer finne alle kyllingene rundt om i leiligheten.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg vil ikke krangle
programme.desc: Carly makes Sam en unik iCarly T-skjorte for å markere årsdagen for vennskapet deres. Men når Sam bytter den bort mot konsertbiletter, havner de to vennene i klammeri.

programme.title: iCarly: Dansende drømmer
programme.desc: iCarly ber fansen om å sende inn videoer av dem selv når de danser sine kuleste danser. Over tre tusen danseklipp kommer inn, og Carly, Sam og Freddie prøver å holde seg oppe hele natten for å se på alle videoene.

programme.title: iCarly: Det spøker på Halloween
programme.desc: Carly, Sam og Freddie sender iCarly fra en leilighet som det sies at det spøker i. Når det begynner å skje nifse ting, begynner også vennene å bli redde for at spøkelsesryktene er sanne.

programme.title: iCarly: En dag jeg vil angre
programme.desc: Spencer redder livet til hovedsangeren i The Plain White T's og får ham til å gå med på å delta i iCarly. Merkelige ting begynner å gå feil midt i Carlys, Sams og Freddies nettvideosending.

programme.title: iCarly: Gjensittingen
programme.desc: Sam må sitte igjen den kvelden iCarly holder sin 50. nettvideospesialsending. Carly og Freddie kan da altså ikke gjøre som de pleier, så de prøver så godt de kan å få gjennsitting de også, så de kan sende fra skolebenken med Sam.

programme.title: iCarly: Fotsår reklame
programme.desc: Carly, Sam og Freddie blir invitert til Dakas hovedkvarter, der de blir tilbudt en stor pengesum får å gå god for Dakas nye sko, Tech-foten, på iCarly. Men det viser seg at skoene er forferdelige.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg lover å ikke sladre
programme.desc: Carly får en B på historieprøven hun burde ha fått en A på. Sam, som griper sjansen på sitt ukentlige møte med rektor Franklin, forandrer Carlys karakter på datamaskinen og overrasker henne med A blank.

programme.title: iCarly: iCarly redder TV
programme.desc: En prestisjetung produsent vil gjøre iCarly om til et TV-show. Men Carly, Sam og Freddie blir raskt fortvilet når de hører om alle de store forandringene produsenten ønsker å foreta.
