programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Encounter
programme.desc: Guest star Elizabeth Ashley plays the alcoholic wife of a crime syndicate leader whose involvement in an intimidation racket and the cold-blooded murder of an employee puts the IMF team on his trail.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Underwater
programme.desc: Stolen gems worth seventy-five million dollars scheduled to be fenced to an underworld figure suddenly disappear and the ship on which they were being transported is blown up at sea bringing the IMF team into the picture.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Invasion
programme.desc: Guest star Kevin McCarthy plays the role of a highly-placed Defense Department advisor who has murdered an Air Force official and sold vital top-secret material about America's nuclear defenses to foreign powers.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Blues
programme.desc: Barney poses as a prospective rock-music recording artist to get evidence linking an organized crime figurehead played by guest star William Windom to the sudden death of a beautiful recording star who was being blackmailed by the syndicate.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Visitors
programme.desc: Guest star Steve Forrest plays the role of a millionaire publisher and communications tycoon who has sold fifty-one percent of his empire to an underworld crime syndicate which gives them a powerful influence over state politics.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Nerves
programme.desc: Christopher George guest stars in the role of a psychotic ex-convict determined to wreak vengeance on society.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Run for the Money
programme.desc: Guest stars Richard Jaeckel and Herbert Edelman play gangsters who try to get control of all the illegal betting parlors in the country as well as a virtual takeover of all thoroughbred horse racing.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Connection
programme.desc: Jim Phelps and his IMF team are given the assignment of breaking an underworld ring attempting to set up one of the world's largest drug manufacturing plants off the coast of Africa.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Bride
programme.desc: Casey poses as a young peasant girl from Europe imported to be the bride of Joe Corvin, the top man at getting underworld millions into Swiss banks.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Stone Pillow
programme.desc: Guest star Bradford Dillman plays Edison, a former private detective turned extortionist who is blackmailing a powerful crime chief with a roll of film linking him to murder.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Image
programme.desc: Barney assumes the identity of a powerful psychic from a Caribbean island kingdom in order to hypnotize a defecting crime syndicate leader into revealing his super secret list of government officials on the take.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Committed
programme.desc: Nora Dawson, a witness to a murder, is committed to an asylum and is being systematically driven out of her mind with drugs when the IMF team is given twenty-four hours to save her life.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Bag Woman
programme.desc: Posing as a bag woman for a crooked politician, Casey unknowingly carries an attached case locked to her wrist filled with both money and a bomb set to explode upon opening.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Double Dead
programme.desc: Gangsters running a loan-shark racket in Hawaii short-circuit the IMF team's investigation when they capture Willy and feed him gigantic doses of truth serum.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Casino
programme.desc: Guest star Jack Cassidy is Orin Kerr, an ex-hoodlum who now controls the largest gambling resort in the western hemisphere as a front for the underworld crime syndicate.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Trapped
programme.desc: Jim Phelps is struck on the head and loses his memory while trying to intercept an eight-million-dollar smuggling operation.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Break!
programme.desc: Carl Betz, Barbara Anderson, and Robert Conrad guest star alongside Jim Phelps who, with the aid of Barney's electronic wizardry, takes on the guise of a hot-shot pool hustler to break up an illegal gambling operation.

programme.title: Da Ray Møtte Helen
programme.desc: På merkelige måter, og helt uavhengige av hverandre, får Ray og Helen plutselig mye penger mellom hendene. Det gir dem muligheten til å gjenskape seg selv. Mens Ray og Helen jukser seg vei til det søte liv, krysses deres stier.

programme.title: The Immigrant
programme.desc: New York, 1921. Den polske kvinnen Ewa (Marion Cotillard) og hennes søster Magda seiler til Amerika i jakten på den amerikanske drøm og starten på et nytt liv. Men det skal vise seg at det nye livet blir krevende.

programme.title: Kjærlighetens Historie
programme.desc: Det var en gang en gutt som het Leo, som elsket en pike som het Alma. Han lovte å få henne til å le hele livet. Men krigen skilte dem.

programme.title: Couples Vacation
programme.desc: På randen til havari i ekteskap og karriere drar den arbeidsløse forfatteren Jack Spencer og hans kone Amanda på ferie. Med en uventet dobbeltbooking blir den private, romantiske luksusen alt annet enn privat og romantisk.

programme.title: Frankie & Johnny
programme.desc: Pfeiffer spiller Frankie, en servitrise som jobber på en kaffebar i New York. Etter en rekke vonde forhold er en ny mann det siste Frankie ser etter... helt til en kommer og ser etter henne.

programme.title: The Female Brain
programme.desc: Den strenge nevroforskeren Julias dypdykk i hvordan den kvinnelige og den mannlige hjernen jobber. Men Julias standhaftige oppfatninger blir utfordret når en kjekk ny deltaker melder seg til prosjektet hennes.

programme.title: Road Less Traveled
programme.desc: Country-sangerinnen Charlotte vender tilbake til Tennessee før hun gifter seg. Når hun møter ungdomskjærligheten, blir noe levende og hun stiller spørsmål ved alt.

programme.title: What If
programme.desc: Den håpløst romantiske Wallace har droppet ut av medisinstudiet og har brent seg på kjærligheten. Når han møter Chantry, som dessverre er i et forpliktende forhold til kjæresten Ben, oppstår en umiddelbar gnist mellom dem.

programme.title: Boys And Girls
programme.desc: Ryan (Freddie Prinze, Jr.) and Jennifer (Claire Forlani) couldn't be more different. As kids, they couldn't stand one another. As adults, its their differences that bind them together in this fun RomCom from the director of SHE'S ALL THAT.

programme.title: Vendepunktet
programme.desc: Vincent blir separert fra sin vakre, men reserverte kone, og er utro med en blid og lidenskapelig skribent. Kjærligheten hennes lover en ny begynnelse, men Vincent slites mellom de to kvinnene, så hans fremtidige lykke står på spill.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Speak Now
programme.desc: As a young couple is about to tie the knot, Johnny has a troubling vision of their future and must find a way to reveal what he sees.

programme.title: Scream 3
programme.desc: Den første filmen la grunnlaget. I oppfølgeren ble listen hevet. I den tredje delen av den suksessfulle franchisen SCREAM, er ingenting umulig. Det er et skrekkfilm-kaos med overraskende vendinger.

programme.title: Rings
programme.desc: Når en radikal universitetsprofessor oppdager den mystiske videoen som ryktes å drepe seeren etter syv dager, engasjerer han sine studenter i et farlig eksperiment for å avsløre hemmeligheten bak legenden om Samara.

programme.title: Congo
programme.desc: Når en oppdagers leting etter en diamantgruve ender tragisk i Kongo, sender faren og lederen for operasjonen dr. Karen Ross inn i jungelen for å fortsette letingen... kanskje etter sønnen sin. Men definitivt etter diamantene.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Little People
programme.desc: An astronaut declares himself a god when his ship lands on a planet populated by people smaller than ants.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Last Night of a Jockey
programme.desc: A dejected jockey wants to be tall.
programme.sub-title: The Last Night of a Jockey

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Dummy
programme.desc: A ventriloquist is convinced that his dummy, Willie, is alive and evil. He makes plans for a new act with a new dummy: plans that Willie doesn't support!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Four of Us are Dying
programme.desc: A man who can change his face to resemble others gets into hot water with gangsters.
programme.sub-title: The Four of Us are Dying

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Black Leather Jackets
programme.desc: Three tough-looking men on motorcycles disrupt a peaceful suburb when they move in. Yet the neighbors could never imagine just how dangerous these men really are.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Jungle
programme.desc: Alan Richards plans to build a dam in Africa on a tribe's ancestral land. The tribe's witch doctor puts a curse on him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The After Hours
programme.desc: A woman discovers that the floor of a department store, on which she bought a gold thimble, doesn't exist - and that her 'saleslady' is really a mannequin!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Lateness of the Hour
programme.desc: The daughter of an inventor objects to their 'perfect' home where they are waited on by mechanical servants.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Passersby
programme.desc: On the road home from the Civil War, a Confederate soldier stops at a burned-out house and gets to know the owner, a recent widow.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Third From the Sun
programme.desc: With all-out nuclear war about to ignite, a scientist and his pilot friend plot to escape on an experimental spaceship.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Probe 7, Over and Out
programme.desc: The lone survivors of two annihilated worlds are stranded on a distant planet.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Here There Be Monsters
programme.desc: Johnny Smith's life is threatened when he's charged with witchcraft in a small New England town.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Numb
programme.desc: A serious case of appendicitis sends Johnny into another coma, and this time it's up to Sarah to save his life.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Drift
programme.desc: During a visit with Bruce, Johnny is struck with a vision of a valuable filly being stolen on the eve of a big horse race.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Mighty Casey
programme.desc: A scientist arranges to have his human-looking robot pitch for the struggling local baseball team.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Vanguard
programme.desc: Johnny (Anthony Michael Hall) must discover why his reunion with a former student (Danny Masterson), who is now a top biomedical researcher, triggers his visions of Stillson (Sean Patrick Flanery) and a future Armageddon.

programme.title: Scary Movie 2
programme.desc: Noen har ført kjærligheten din til oppfølgerne for langt! Favorittkomirollene til Scary Movie er tilbake i en film som skremmer opp enda mer ærbødig moro enn originalen med sitt syn på klisjéhjemsøkte thrillere.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Adaptation
programme.desc: Mens Team Scorpion jobber for å stoppe en tilstrømning av narkotika som blir smuglet inn i landet via droner, gir Walter Happy og Toby et ultimatum for deres nye forhold.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: The Fast and the Nerdiest
programme.desc: Teamet må infiltrere en eksklusiv bilsmuglingsoperasjon som er i ferd med å sende biovåpen til Sør-Amerika.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Ticker
programme.desc: Når blodforsyningen til Los Angeles blir hacket og ansett som ubrukelig, må Team Scorpion finne den skyldige og redde en ung jente som desperat trenger en hjertetransplantasjon.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Djibouti Call
programme.desc: Cabe blir tatt til fange under et hemmelig oppdrag i Djibouti sammen med sin nye Homeland-protégé Tim Armstrong, og Team Scorpion må redde ham.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Twist and Shout
programme.desc: Team Scorpions oppdrag for redde restene av falne marinesoldater i Vietnam er truet sammen med livet deres når en dødelig tornado kommer direkte mot dem.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Hard Knox
programme.desc: Teamet blir hyret av forsvarsdepartementet for å bryte seg inn i Fort Knox og "stjele" en dyrebar gjenstand for å teste sikkerheten deres.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Chernobyl Intentions
programme.desc: Team Scorpion drar til Tsjernobyl for å reparere den forefallende atomreaktoren før en katastrofal nedsmelting, men må også redde Sylvester og Paige når de blir fanget inne.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Toby or Not Toby
programme.desc: Team Scorpion må være smartere enn deres ustabile eks-Scorpion-medlem, Mark Collins, etter at han kidnapper Toby og truer med å drepe ham med mindre hans utspekulerte krav blir oppfylt.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: More Civil War
programme.desc: Team Scorpion må legge problemene til side når anonyme hackere med ukjente motiver tar kontroll over amerikanske militærfly og krigsskip og retter våpen mot amerikanske byer.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: It Isn't the Fall That Kills You
programme.desc: Akkurat i det teamet gjør fremskritt mot hackerne som kontrollerer amerikanske krigsskip, får de vite at en amerikansk atomubåt også er blitt hacket.
programme.sub-title: It Isn't the Fall That Kills You

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Little Boy Lost
programme.desc: Når Walter ved et uhell blir skutt ut i verdensrommet i en rakett, hallusinerer han om Paige mens oksygenet hans går tom, og Team Scorpion jobber febrilsk for å finne en måte å få ham hjem før han blir kvalt.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Little Boy Lost
programme.desc: Teamet må finne en gutt fra Ralphs klasse som forsvinner på en ekskursjon etter å ha støtt på en dødelig forbryter.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Bat Poop Crazy
programme.desc: Team Scorpions enkle jobb ved Natural History Museum i Los Angeles blir dødelig når de oppdager tyver som raner en utstilling med sjeldne edelstener for å berike en atombombe.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: We're Gonna Need a Bigger Vote
programme.desc: Før Halloween må teamet infiltrere et dypt, enormt hulesystem for å hindre en flaggermusbestand i å ødelegge det nordamerikanske økosystemet.
programme.sub-title: We're Gonna Need a Bigger Vote

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Sly and the Family Stone
programme.desc: På valgdagen, når demokratiet står på spill, blir Team Scorpion kalt inn når noen prøver å skape kaos i det amerikanske presidentvalget.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Mother Load
programme.desc: Når Team Scorpion reiser til Irland for Megans ettårsjubileum, oppdager Walter at en naturkatastrofe i en innsjø i nærheten har skapt en giftig sky som kan drepe alle i landsbyen.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: This Is the Pits
programme.desc: Paiges mor verver Team Scorpion når hun ved et uhell oppdager en glemt atomreaktor i ferd med å eksplodere.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Wreck the Halls
programme.desc: Walter må svømme gjennom de dødelige La Brea-tjæregropene mens teamet hjelper en kvinne som sitter fast i tjæren før hun går tom for oksygen.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Wreck the Halls
programme.desc: Det er julaften og Team Scorpions elektronikkfrie ferie på fjellet blir dødelig når de støter på våpensmuglere og Ralph blir kidnappet mens de prøver å rømme.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Ice Ca-Cabes
programme.desc: Når et oppdrag i ørkenen resulterer i eksploderende splinter som skader Cabe alvorlig, må Team Scorpion fryse kroppen for å redde livet hans.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: The Hole Truth
programme.desc: Når Team Scorpion blir lurt til å produsere falske penger for en utenlandsk enhet som ønsker å ødelegge den amerikanske økonomien, må Paige stole på moren Veronicas ferdigheter som svindler for å redde dem.

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 502
programme.desc: Anita og Martins to barn har tatt over hjemmet, og det er leker overalt. Løsningen er et større hjem, men paret har ikke klart å finne det rette huset enda. Nå får de hjelp av ekspertene, men det blir ikke lett.

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 503
programme.desc: Tina og Danni solgte rekkehuset sitt i den tro at de snart skulle finne det rette huset. Men sånn gikk det ikke. Paret er utrolig kresne, og har høye krav. Kan ekspertene skape hjemmet som Tina og Danni drømmer om?

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 504
programme.desc: Laura og Jesper og Jespers to barn leier i Humlebæk, og de er mildt sagt lei av det. De mangler plass, hage - og de vil også ha barn sammen snart. Men to års husjakt har ikke gitt resultat.

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 505
programme.desc: Ulla og Kristian bor i en vakker herskapsleilighet på Frederiksberg med sine to barn. Men de vil ha mer plass i et barnevennlig nabolag, innom sykkelavstand fra sentrum. Kan Tobias Edlev-Nielsen finne et hus til dem?

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 506
programme.desc: En liten leiebolig i Vanløse og to små barn - ikke den beste kombinasjonen. Lisa og Erling drømmer om et stort hus med en stor hage. Tobias må jobbe hardt, da drømmene er mye større enn budsjettet.

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO
programme.desc: Kristian drømmer om en diger garasje, og Nathja vil heller bli i Køge – kan Tobias oppfylle drømmene sine?

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO
programme.desc: Maja og Kenneth bor på Vestjylland og drømmer om å komme nærmere familien til Maja i Silkeborg. Men budsjettet deres krever at de går på akkord med beliggenheten og ser i de nærliggende små byene.

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 603
programme.desc: I Ikast er Camilla og Marc sultne på et hus med plass til oppbevaring. Men når Tobias finner et stort hus til dem, mister de motet, da det nå er SÅ mange rom som må pusses opp...

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 604
programme.desc: Stine og Daniel lengter etter mer plass før de snart utvider familien fra tre til fire. Derfor er det ikke optimalt når Mads ringer og forteller at avtalen med det nye huset deres i Langå ikke gjelder.

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 301
programme.desc: Astrid og Steffen skal kjøpe sitt første hus, men de kan ikke gå på kompromiss med ønskene sine. De møter programmets eksperter som skal kjøpe et hus på deres vegne.

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 302
programme.desc: Louise og Michael har vokst ut av sin lille leilighet i Århus og trenger mer plass. Paret gjør et kompromiss, og Louise står overfor sitt største mareritt i huset som ekspertene kjøper til dem.

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 303
programme.desc: Charlotte og Mikkel bor i en så liten leilighet at dusjen må tømmes for ting hver gang de skal bade. Men nå ønsker de å flytte litt ut av byen sammen med sønnen deres.

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 304
programme.desc: Pernille og Nicklas fra Odense bor så lite at hvis de trenger litt privatliv, så har de bare toalettet å ty til. Nicklas drømmer om å få et kjøkken med to ovner, slik at han kan lage mer mat.

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 305
programme.desc: Wendy og Jesper fra Kalundborg bor allerede bra, i en leilighet som har en utrolig utsikt. Men en kommende familieforøkelse betyr at de må finne noe som er større.

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 306
programme.desc: Jonas og Louise får sjokk når de ser hvilke hus de har råd til. Mads Mikkelsen og Tobias Edlev Nielsen jobber overtid for å prøve å oppfylle parets ønsker.

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 307
programme.desc: Mads og Mia ønsker å flytte litt utenfor byen - men ikke helt på landet. Med Tobias og Mads sin hjelp kjøper de en bolig som har nøyaktig alt de ikke liker.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Florø
programme.desc: Tareq visits Norway and Florø to celebrate their national day -17th of May. Surrounded by breathtaking archipelagos and stunning fjords he dives for scallops in the north sea, cooking at mountain peaks and exploring the history of norwegian salmon

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Estonia
programme.desc: Tareq makes his way across the baltic sea to Estonia and the capital Tallinn. He discovers the historical treasures of the city and its thriving culinary life before he heads out into the vast and beautiful countryside and the national park of Soomaa.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Ringkøbing
programme.desc: Ringkøbing, a lovely old market town located at the west coast of Denmark. Here, Tareq visit a traditional Herring Festival and meets up with local entrepreneurs who have learned to adapt to this ever-changing environment.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Falkenberg
programme.desc: Something is definitely happening in Falkenberg on the west coast of Sweden. Over the last couple of years it have become somewhat of a haven for foodies. Tareq is on a mission; taking him through a fertile landscape with vineyards and salmon fishing.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Estonia (Part 2)
programme.desc: Estonia has embarked on a journey greatly inspired by the nordic cuisine. Tareq explores the countryside of Estonia before he returns to the capital of Tallinn where he meets people that really love their traditional food.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Öland
programme.desc: Tareq bikes through the unique landscape of Öland, Sweden's second largest island located in the Baltic Sea. It is a place where the interaction between man and nature have created a diverse and rich farmland with an amazing amount of small producers.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Bornholm
programme.desc: Bornholm, the sunny bright green island with it’s own gastronomic tone is a true pioneer when it comes to local food at it’s finest quality. Tareq visit Denmark's first regional food culture house where they develop this unique flourishing cuisine.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Laponia
programme.desc: In the northern part of Sweden, you’ll find the stunning world heritage Laponia. Almost 10.000 square kilometres of nature reserves and national parks. Tareq visit the rich, unique culture of the sami in the vast impressive wilderness.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Malmö & Copenhagen
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor returns to his home turf to see what has happened and what the future might bring to the new nordic cuisine. He visits a local goat farmer and meets up with young enthusiastic chefs who takes this nordic legacy further.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Zealand
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor visits the South Coast of Denmark to make his own versions of open-faced sandwiches and smoked fish dishes.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Dalsland
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor puts on his hiking boots and explores the pilgrim trail of Dalsland in West Sweden. This episode will include outdoor cooking, foraging and beaver safari.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Stockholm
programme.desc: When Tareq arrives in Stockholm he will meet innovation and world class gastronomy, a big city for foodies. He will make some pizza at the Rosendal garden café and go on an adventure in the archipielago.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Lolland
programme.desc: When Michelin star chefs move from Copenhagen to the countryside, they often end up in Lolland/Falster. Here Tareq will meet Claus Meyer the father of new nordic cuisine and other entrepreneurs that opened interesting restaurants here.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Skåne
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor explores his own backyard of Skåne and hometown of Malmö, a multi cultural food mix. Here you can find food and culture from all over the world that makes it a unique culinary destination.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Best Of
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor looks back on some of the food adventures he has been part of in the program series Nordic Cookery. Tareq promises delicacies from all over the Nordics and meetings with fantastic people along the way.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Läckö & Kinnekulle
programme.desc: By Lake Vänern you find Läckö and Kinnekulle, an area rich in history, culture and traditions. Tareq cooks exciting dishes on vendice roe, fish and local cheeses - all served on porcelain from the world-famous Rörstrand.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Sjuhärad
programme.desc: Sjuhärad is nature and culture in perfect symbiosis. Tareq takes the bike to meet some of the food entrepreneurs in the area who have started exciting new businesses. Here you live close to nature, forest and lakes.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Greater Copenhagen
programme.desc: Copenhagen and Skåne are a hot food destinations. Tareq visits Østergro, Denmark's first "rooftop farm" in the middle of Copenhagen, Eden in the new district Hyllie, Malmö and Häckeberga Castle where there will be wild boar for dinner.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Höganäs
programme.desc: The wild coast at Kullaberg in Skåne has a lot of culture and gastronomy to offer. Fantastic ceramics, vineyards and world-class ice cream. Tareq visits VikenTomater and cooks vegetarian ragù

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Karlstad
programme.desc: Tareq visits sunny Karlstad! Here, food is prepared by Vänern's shores and in Värmland's deep forests. Butter-fried Zander, crepes and cooking over an open fire are on the menu.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Best Of (Part 2)
programme.desc: Once again, Tareq Taylor looks back on some of the food adventures he has been part of in the program series Nordic Cookery. Tareq promises delicacies from all over the Nordics and meetings with fantastic people along the way.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Lund
programme.desc: In this episode, Tareq visits Lund, a thousand-year old city in southern Sweden. Lund is surrounded by the richest farmland in the country, and we explore nearby islands and meet entrepreneurs making highly-regarded local products.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Bornholm
programme.desc: Tareq sails out to Bornholm, a Danish island close to southern tip of Sweden. The islanders are fiercely self-sufficient and this attitude reflects in the huge number of food producers making products that are sold both locally and internationally.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Jokkmokk
programme.desc: Far above the Arctic Circle, Tareq explores the wild country around Jokkmokk. Here, the Sami people lived from what the land provides for thousands of years. This wild cuisine is as extreme as the weather here.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Åland
programme.desc: For hundreds of years, Åland’s shipping fleet was the envy of navies around the world, and their sea trade was encouraged by the seafood, grains and fruits that thrive on these islands. Tareq prepares recipes to reflect Åland’s unique cuisine.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Malmö
programme.desc: Tareq is in his hometown of Malmö – Sweden’s third largest city. The food scene here is inspired by the traditional seafood dishes and the large immigrant population whose recipes have given Malmö a new energy.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Finland's South Coast
programme.desc: Tareq takes a late autumn trip along Finland’s southern coast. He stops in the capital Helsinki to see how the city's food culture is about to be discovered by the rest of the world, and dives into the freezing waters around Ekenäs.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Kiruna
programme.desc: Tareq arrives in Kiruna, over 200km north of the Arctic Circle. With the weather getting down to -30C, Tareq takes part in snow picnics, firing up the smoker, and using snow and ice as part of the recipes he prepares.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Bergen
programme.desc: Surrounded by some of the most beautiful landscapes in northern Europe, Bergen has become a centre for the finest seafood in northern Europe. Tareq heads into this winter wonderland to see the curious cuisine that has developed in western Norway.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and the FBI re-open a 17-year-old unsolved case when the badge of a missing LAPD officer, who is presumed dead, is found at a construction site.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When a competitive mixed-martial arts fighter dies suspiciously in the ring while training for a championship match, the victim's sparring partner, who also happens to be friends with David, becomes the prime suspect.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: While Don is unreachable at a therapy session, the FBI and Charlie try to find the son of a music mogul whose kidnapper threatens to kill the boy if he is not paid a multi-million dollar ransom in one hour.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Charlie tries to connect a series of murders to a voter fraud conspiracy and must track down who benefits the most from the rigged elections before more people die.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When a small plane mysteriously crashes, Charlie tests the flight computer and uncovers the truth behind what brought the plane down.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: While on the hunt for a serial letter bomber, Don and Charlie disagree over whether a suspected bomber, who had eluded conviction years earlier, is the person responsible for the latest murder.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don believes that a death row inmate has an ulterior motive when he suddenly wants to confess the whereabouts of bodies he buried during his days as a hit man for the mob.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and the FBI uncover a possible terrorist attack on Los Angeles that targets the city's water supply.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When thieves hijack a truck filled with valuable medical supplies, $50 million dollars intended for a relief effort in Zambia and two aid workers, the FBI races a second violent crew intent on getting to the goods first.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: In the wake of a deadly standoff with a mysterious, yet, brilliant bomber, Don and Charlie discover that he was poisoned to keep him from exposing a shocking secret that will change the FBI team forever, on the third season finale.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Agent Colby Granger lands in prison after the discovery that he was a mole within the FBI, but he escapes, and it's up to Don and his team to track him down and uncover the truth on the fourth season premiere.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: A typical morning at a coffee shop turns into a nightmare when a car collides into it, leaving one person dead and many injured. But what appears to be a car's accidental loss of control is soon exposed to be more.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: A series of secrets and blackmail involving a young, up and coming actor are exposed when Don and his team investigate the murder of a young woman in his Hollywood Hills mansion.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: After recognizing numerological patterns in the Bible verses that the killer leaves behind, Don and his team are able to track the killer's movements but are one step behind when a gripping twist brings the chase to an end.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: A bank for the rich and powerful is robbed but the stolen contents of the safety deposit boxes are being liquidated and donated to charities, and it's up to Don and Charlie to uncover the true motivation behind the humanitarian thief.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don feels responsible for the death of a participant in the Witness Protection Program after she is gunned down in her home.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and the team investigate the secret world of alternate reality games after a man plunges to his death while participating in one such game. Amita's life is in danger when her hidden gaming ability becomes the key to tracking down the killer.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When a mega-heiress is abducted by an extremist group looking to punish her industrialist father, Don and the team rush to find her captors, but their attempt to save her takes a startling turn when they to uncover the group's true motivation.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Charlie works to find an extremely rare comic that was stolen during a deadly robbery at a comic book convention. Wil Wheaton guest stars as Miles Sklar.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and the team come under pressure when a former FBI subcontractor shoots an agent inside the FBI headquarters and takes one of their own as a hostage, leaving them with a severely restricted plan of action.

programme.title: Frøkens Kjæledegge
programme.desc: Clark Gable plays Jim Gannon, a school-of-hard-knocks newspaperman who despises journalism schools, until he sees who's doing the teaching.

programme.title: Saturday Night Fever
programme.desc: Fra John Travoltas fengslende og Oscar-nominerte prestasjon, til Bee Gees suksess-soundtrack og den uforglemmelige dansingen - 'Saturday Night Fever' er en filmsensasjon som fanget verdens oppmerksomhet som aldri før.

programme.title: Walking Tall
programme.desc: Basert på livet til sheriffen Buford Pusser fra Tennessee ryddet opp på egen hånd i kriminalitet og korrupsjon i sin lille by, men på bekostning av familielivet og nesten sitt eget liv.

programme.title: The Humanity Bureau
programme.desc: I en dystopisk fremtid blir "uproduktive" borgere deportert. En agent oppdager sannheten bak systemet og risikerer alt for å redde en mor og hennes sønn.

programme.title: Pumping Iron
programme.desc: Arnold Schwarzenegger og Lou Ferrigno møter hverandre i en intens konkurranse om Mr. Olympia-tittelen i denne kritikerroste filmen som gjorde Schwarzenegger berømt.

programme.title: When Worlds Collide
programme.desc: An impending collision with a runaway star signals the destruction of earth. As doomsday approaches, they race against time and the panic of those who will be left behind.

programme.title: Meatballs
programme.desc: Bill Murray spiller Tripper Harrison, sjefsveileder på Camp North Star. Det blir underholdende når han, og den skandaløse gjengen hans av leirveiledere, har det for seg å bryte alle regler i boka.

programme.title: Welcome to Collinwood
programme.desc: Cosimo får en plan for en kjempejobb av sin cellekamerat. Han ber kvinnen sin om å finne en patsy for tyveriet av bilen hans, og tilbyr 15 000 dollar. Plutselig er 7 involvert.

programme.title: The Lodger: A Story of the London Fog
programme.desc: En huseier mistenker at den nye losjeren hennes er galningen som dreper kvinner i London.

programme.title: Barbarella
programme.desc: Settingen er planeten Lythion i år 40 000, der Barbarella må nødlande mens hun reiser gjennom verdensrommet. Hun beseirer det onde i form av roboter og monstre. Hun belønner også de kjekke mennene som ledsager henne på eventyrene.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Diane's Allergy
programme.desc: Etter å ha flyttet inn hos Frasier, utvikler Diane en kronisk allergi og tror at hans elskede hund, Pavlov, er årsaken.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Peterson Crusoe
programme.desc: Norm bestemmer seg for å leve livet fullt ut når han får de medisinske prøveresultatene.

programme.title: Cheers NO: A Ditch in Time
programme.desc: I baren får Sams uskyldige flørt med en attraktiv kunde, Amanda, ham i trøbbel når han ikke skjønner at hun er medlem av Dianes terapigruppe.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Whodunit?
programme.desc: Carla vinner favør og beundring fra Frasiers anerkjente mentor.

programme.title: Cheers NO: The Heart Is a Lonely Snipehunter

programme.sub-title: The Heart Is a Lonely Snipehunter

programme.title: Cheers NO: King of the Hill
programme.desc: Sam melder seg frivillig til å spille en veldedighetskamp mot Playboy Playmates.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Teacher's Pet
programme.desc: Sam kommer tilbake til skolen for å få vitnemålet sitt.

programme.title: Cheers NO: The Mail Goes to Jail
programme.desc: Norm setter Cliffs jobb i fare når han tar over jobben for én dag.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Bar Bet
programme.desc: Et gammelt veddemål tvinger Sam til å velge mellom å gifte seg eller miste Cheers.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Behind Every Great Man
programme.desc: En skarp journalist besøker Cheers, men mister interessen pga. Sams arroganse.

programme.title: Cheers NO: If Ever I Would Leave You

programme.sub-title: If Ever I Would Leave You

programme.title: Cheers NO: The Executive's Executioner
programme.desc: Norm blir tvunget til en forfremmelse som tvinger ham å sparke noen ansatte.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Med mye angst bestemmer Diane seg for å forlate Cheers og reise til Europa med Frasier, som har blitt tilbudt en midlertidig stilling ved universitet i Bologna.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Carla ansetter en engelsk kvinne for å fylle Dianes plass mens hun er i Europa.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Carla tar hevn på en tidligere rektor som hun forakter.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: I den spennende sesongsfinalen frir Frasier til Diane mens de er i Europa, og ønsker å gifte seg dagen etter.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Birth, Death, Love and Rice
programme.desc: Frasier kommer tilbake til Cheers med nyheten om at Diane har gått i kloster.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Woody Goes Belly Up
programme.desc: Sam og Diane overrasker Woody med besøk av en gammel kjenning.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Someday My Prince Will Come
programme.desc: Diane finner en kåpe, og tror den mystiske eieren er mannen hun alltid har drømt om.

programme.title: Cheers NO: The Groom Wore Clearasil
programme.desc: Carlas 16-årige sønn vil gifte seg med kjæresten fra skoletiden.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Diane's Nightmare
programme.desc: Diane er overbevist om at den galne skuespilleren fra fortiden hennes er ute etter å ta henne.

programme.title: Cheers NO: I'll Gladly Pay You Tuesday
programme.desc: Sam prøver å dekke over sannheten når han mister Dianes uvurderlige bok.

programme.title: Cheers NO: 2 Good To Be 4 Reel
programme.desc: Gjengen på Cheers prøver å løfte humøret til Carla når hun legger ut en personlig annonse.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Love Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Norm ansetter en privat etterforsker for å finne ut om Vera har en affære.

programme.title: Cheers NO: From Beer To Eternity
programme.desc: Cheers-gjengen utfordrer en rivaliserende bar i en bowlingturnering.

programme.title: Cheers NO: The Bar Stoolie
programme.desc: Cliff får vite at farens hans lever et hemmelig liv.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Don Juan Is Hell
programme.desc: Sam er temaet i Dianes forskningsartikkel.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Fools And Their Money
programme.desc: Når Woody blir hekta på tipping, trør Sam inn for å få ham til å innse feilen.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Take My Shirt…Please
programme.desc: Sam innser at baseballdagene hans er over når ingen byr på trøya hans.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Suspicion
programme.desc: Diane stoler ikke på noen når hun er sikker på at hevnen kommer.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Triangle
programme.desc: Diane legger en plan for å redde Frasier.

programme.desc: Cliff inviterer Diane og Carla til et årlig ball, og uventet sier de begge ja.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Second Time Around
programme.desc: Sam reagerer når Frasier vil gifte seg med den første jenta han dater etter Lilith.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Dark Imaginings
programme.desc: Sam kan ikke godta det faktum at han blir eldre.

programme.title: COPS: Bike for Sale
programme.desc: A deputy pursues a man who fled from a traffic stop. A deputy chases a suspicious man leaving an apartment complex. Two men claim they are trying sell a bike during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS: She Needed a Nap
programme.desc: Deputies pursue a man involved in a carjacking. Deputies are called to an altercation between a father and son. Officers respond to an unresponsive woman lying in a roadway.

programme.title: COPS: Mamma's House
programme.desc: Deputies search for a man who ran from a traffic stop. A man being pursued tells officers he was going to his mother's house. A drunk driver won't admit to hitting a car.

programme.title: COPS: Mean Girls Times Two
programme.desc: Deputies are forced to taser a man after pursuing him into a field. A driver plays dumb when asked about the revolver under his car seat. Officers respond to two teenage girls in a fight.

programme.title: COPS: Backseat Denial
programme.desc: An officer struggles with a man reaching for something in his pocket. A man won't cop to the gun in his backseat. Police arrive on the scene when a man threatens to shoot his wife.

programme.title: COPS: An Innocent Gardener
programme.desc: Officers pursue a vehicle that struck a police car. Two men deny the lawnmower in their truck was stolen. Deputies are called when a mother attempts to run her daughter over.

programme.title: COPS: Penalty Box
programme.desc: A man sneaking away from a bar fight clams he was chased by a truck. Deputies are called when a woman assaults people at a skating rink. A drunk man abandons his truck on train tracks.

programme.title: COPS: Pup and Rescue
programme.desc: A driver denies ownership of what police find in his car. Police conduct a narcotics sting that nets several arrests. A deputy removes a pooch from the scene of an accident.

programme.title: COPS: Undercover Blues
programme.desc: Police work a sting that targets drug dealers. An undercover sting uncovers narcotics trafficking. Police respond to a burglary in progress and discover a flop house.

programme.title: COPS: Multiple Identities
programme.desc: Officers recover a baggie of drugs from a crying suspect. A drunk woman hides a second ID in her back pocket. Police stop a vehicle that hit a patrol car.

programme.title: COPS: Donut Pursuit
programme.desc: Officers pursue a truck after a donut shop robbery. Deputies are dispatched when a wife attacks her husband with an unknown object. Deputies respond to a mother and son knife fight.

programme.title: COPS: Kick the Car
programme.desc: Officers intervene when an estranged husband kicks his ex-wife's boyfriend's car. A man claims someone gave him the car he is driving. A woman claims the pills in her purse are not hers.

programme.title: COPS: Maybe it's Sugar
programme.desc: Police conduct a sting operation. A woman is covered in white powder during a traffic stop. Officers spot a young boy on a bike who wandered away from home.

programme.title: COPS: Not a Momma's Boy
programme.desc: Officers are called to fight between a mother and her son. Officers respond to a man on a trolley hurling racial slurs at a passenger. A traffic stop uncovers narcotics in a young man's trunk.

programme.title: COPS: All Aboard!
programme.desc: Officers pursue a truck driving backwards on a freeway. A suspect jumps a train to evade police. A woman claims to be disabled when a pill falls from her pocket.

programme.title: COPS: To the Lighthouse
programme.desc: Officers are called to a restaurant after the owner was held at gunpoint. Police respond to a woman being sexually harassed in a park. A drunk man tells police he is going to buy a lighthouse.

programme.title: COPS: Get a Room
programme.desc: A man claims to be protecting the car he broke into. Officers are called to when a couple gets too friendly while out in public. Police are dispatched when a drunk woman pounds on her neighbor's door.

programme.title: COPS: Connect Four
programme.desc: Deputies assist border patrol in pursuit of a vehicle that has blown both a checkpoint and its tires. A drunk woman is pulled over not knowing she is missing a tire.

programme.title: COPS: When Ya Gotta Go
programme.desc: A man urinating in public flees from police on foot. A handgun is found in the vehicle of a driver who claims to be a student leaving class. Deputies find drugs in a man's car.

programme.title: COPS: I Always pay my Debts
programme.desc: A man tries to bite an officer after he was spotted with narcotics. Officers respond to a family fighting in their front yard. A man claims he was just paying someone back when he tried to buy drugs.

programme.title: COPS: Skipping Rocks
programme.desc: A man who ran from police complains that he was not read his rights. Officers detain kids who threw rocks at windowfronts. A paranoid man claims he is being chased by drug dealers.

programme.title: COPS: Tow Time
programme.desc: Police conduct a high-speed chase on a car with a missing tire. Police respond to a tow truck driver being assaulted. Police are called when a relative attacks a woman's husband.

programme.title: COPS: Borderlands
programme.desc: Officers attempt to detain undocumented border crossers. Border patrol discovers a driver with a load of drugs in his car. Officers check passports and a suspicious-looking laptop.

programme.title: COPS: Visiting Hours Twofer
programme.desc: Police respond to a report of prostitution in a hospital parking lot. A man and woman engaged in solicitation are pulled over. A woman in an area known for prostitution tries to evade police.

programme.title: COPS: Ignorance is an Excuse
programme.desc: Two men engage in a fist fight on the street over an alleged robbery. A couple claim that they didn't know the car they are driving was stolen.

programme.title: COPS: Checked Luggage
programme.desc: Agents of the US Customs and Border Protection pursue a vehicle. Border agents spot two undocumented people. Airport Customs detains a man when agents suspect he might be carrying more than luggage.

programme.title: COPS: Uncomfortable Shoes
programme.desc: A driver takes police on a neighborhood chase. Officers are called to capture a 12-foot python hiding outside a home. Officers suspect a motorist with a funny walk is hiding something up his shoe.

programme.title: COPS: In-Law Problems
programme.desc: US Marshals are tasked with finding a young boy that has been kidnapped for ransom. A man suspected of dealing contraband is turned in by his ex-girlfriends mother.

programme.title: COPS: Set Some Boundaries
programme.desc: A couple gets into a fight with their in-laws when they attempt to take their baby on a 3am drive. A man is attacked by his roommate after he gets 'too friendly' with a woman in the home.

programme.title: COPS: Invisible Intruders
programme.desc: A homeowner shoots at intruders only he can see. The driver of a stolen truck claims he's just trying to return the vehicle.. A argument about parenting styles turns ugly when a gun is pulled.

programme.title: COPS: Dance Fighting
programme.desc: A dispute inside a nightclub turns into a street fight. A man patrols his neighborhood 'Old West' style. A K-9 unit is called in to track a burglar on the run.

programme.title: COPS: Do Not Disturb
programme.desc: A prostitute tries to outrun the police during a foot chase. A man claims he can only meet women at motels since he lives with his mom.

programme.title: COPS: Tree Hugging
programme.desc: An ex-felon threatens to kill his spouse after she announces she want to divorce him. A driver has suspicious plants in her car. A woman crashes her friends truck into a pedestrian and a tree.

programme.title: COPS: Crawling to Vegas
programme.desc: A driver leads police on a slow speed chase towards Las Vegas. Three people are suspected of using contraband. A multi-neighbor dispute devolves into a fight involving guns and bats.

programme.title: COPS: First Do No Harm
programme.desc: A suicidal man tries to taunt police into shooting him. Undercover officers bust up an illegal operation at a pain management clinic. A woman claims she's just a bystander to a motorcycle hit and run.

programme.title: COPS: Safe Cracking
programme.desc: A man stages a sit-in in his car in an attempt to stop it from being towed. A homeowner denies that he's selling drugs despite the large amount of evidence found in his home.

programme.title: COPS: High Jump Fail
programme.desc: A family with kids is taken on a high speed car chase. An intoxicated suspect tries to jump a fence while protesting that he's not trying to run away.

programme.title: Star Trek VII: Generations
programme.desc: Picards eneste håp for fremtiden er Nexus... og en legendarisk kaptein fra fortiden.

programme.title: Star Trek: First Contact
programme.desc: Etter en episk kamp mot borgene (cybernetisk forsterkede livsformer), følger kaptein Picard og hans besetning borgene tilbake til 2000-tallet for å hindre at de endrer jordens tidslinje og den første utenomjordiske kontakten.

programme.title: Star Trek IX: Insurrection
programme.desc: Når mannskapet på Enterprise får vite om føderasjonens plott mot innbyggerne av en unik planet, starter kaptein Picard et åpent opprør.

programme.title: Star Trek: Nemesis
programme.desc: Sett kursen mot en galakse med enestående action og eventyr når kaptein Jean-Luc Picard (Patrick Stewart) og hans Starship-mannskap kjempet mot en farlig motstander... Som har en overraskende kobling til Picard!

programme.title: Star Trek I: The Motion Picture
programme.desc: Når et uidentifisert romvesen ødelegger tre kraftfulle Klingon-kryssere, vender kaptein James T. Kirk (William Shatner) tilbake til det nylig ombyggede U.S.S. Enterprise(tm) for å ta kommandoen.

programme.title: Star Trek II: The Wrath of Khan
programme.desc: Det er 2200-tallet. Føderasjonens U.S.S. Enterprise er på et treningsoppdrag og det virker som om admiral James T. Kirk (William Shatner) er resignert på at inspeksjonen kan bli den siste romferden i sin karriere. Men Khan er tilbake.

programme.title: Star Trek 3 - Jakten På Spock
programme.desc: Admiral Kirks seier over Khan og dannelsen av Genesis-planeten er tomme seiere. Spock er død og McCoy drives uforklarlig mot galskap. Så gir et overraskelsesbesøk fra Sarek, Spocks far, en forbløffende avsløring.

programme.title: Star Trek V: The Final Frontier
programme.desc: Mannskapet på Federation-skipet Enterprise tilkalles til Nimbus III, Planeten for intergalaktisk fred. De skal forhandle over en bortføring, men får vite at kidnapperen er en slektning av Spock.

programme.title: Star Trek VI: The Undiscovered Country
programme.desc: Etter årevis med krig, nærmer Federation og Klingon-imperiet seg en fredssamling når et Klingon-skip nesten blir ødelagt i et tilsynelatende angrep fra Enterprise. Begge verdener forbereder seg på det som kan bli deres dødeligste møte så langt.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Savage Murder of a Mother and her Daughter (Amato Case)
programme.desc: On March 31, 2003, firefighters were called to a fire in a housing estate of Meyrargues, near Aix-en-Provence. On site, they discovered a horrific scene: the tortured and charred bodies of a mother and her daughter, Chantal and Audrey D'Amato.
programme.sub-title: The Savage Murder of a Mother and her Daughter (Amato Case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Dire Deception (Laurence Maille Case)
programme.desc: On November 28, 2007, Laurence Maille disappeared. It was her partner, John Zablevski, who alerted the Vimy police in Pas-de-Calais. He explained that the young woman had left in the morning for a walk with their dog and never returned.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Stabed In Her Bed: The Maureen Jaquier Case
programme.desc: On February 27, 2015, in Toulouse, the parents of 19-year-old Maureen Jacquier discover their daughter stabbed several times in her bed.
programme.sub-title: Stabed In Her Bed: The Maureen Jaquier Case

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Shot At Point-Blank: The Aurelie Barbot Affair
programme.desc: On December 20, 2012, in Val d'Izé (Ille-et-Vilaine), Aurélie Barbot, 29, was killed on her doorstep with a bullet to the head.
programme.sub-title: Shot At Point-Blank: The Aurelie Barbot Affair

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: Honeymoon Killers (Van Beers Case)
programme.desc: Marc Van Beers, a 36-year old Brussels tax lawyer, dies in a road accident while on honeymoon. His wife Aurore is unharmed by the accident.
programme.sub-title: Crime Scene Solvers: Honeymoon Killers (Van Beers Case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Laurence Dromard Case
programme.desc: Sylvain Dromard finds the body of his wife Laurence lying in a pool of blood in the kitchen. The crime was particularly violent and the theory of a burglary that went wrong is soon excluded. But investigators don't understand who could want her dead.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Two Young Women Massacred: The Leconte Affair
programme.desc: On July 8, 2002, near Amiens, a farmer discovers the lifeless body of a young woman, Patricia Leclercq, on his field.
programme.sub-title: Two Young Women Massacred: The Leconte Affair

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Shot In the While Sleeping (Richard Alessandri Case)
programme.desc: On the night of July 16, 2000, the life of Edwige Alessandri changed forever. She made a frantic emergency call in the town of Carpentras. She recounted that some men burst into her room and shot her husband while he slept.
programme.sub-title: Shot In the While Sleeping (Richard Alessandri Case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Josiane Bézard Case
programme.desc: On the morning of January 9th 2014, Josiane Bézard, 53 years old, drives her son to the Manosque's train station, and then vanishes.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Julein Thevenet Case
programme.desc: On January 27th 2014, in Somme-Suippe in the Marne, Sophie Thevenet discovers her dead husband's body in the garage.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Raphael Lomoro Case
programme.desc: On June 12th 2007, in Berhen-lès-Forbach, in Moselle, a young woman reports the disappearance of her brother Raphaël Lomoro, 46 years old vanilla producer living in Madagascar.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Key to the Enigma (Farid Ouzzane Case)
programme.desc: On July 13, 2011, two boaters retrieved a suitcase that was floating in the bay of Lorient. Inside, they discovered the tied up corpse of a man. In order to identify this unknown man, whose face was unrecognizable.
programme.sub-title: The Key to the Enigma (Farid Ouzzane Case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Corpse In The Cemetery: The Frederic Butanowicz Case
programme.desc: On November 9, 2011, the body of a man was found near the Courcelles-le-Comte cemetery (Pas-de-Calais).
programme.sub-title: A Corpse In The Cemetery: The Frederic Butanowicz Case

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Deadly Trap For the Interior Designer - Guy Georges Case
programme.desc: On April 18th 2014, in Visé, Belgium, policemen are informed that gunshots had been fired on the street.
programme.sub-title: Deadly Trap For the Interior Designer - Guy Georges Case

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Audrey Jouannet Case
programme.desc: September 16 2005. The lifeless body of Audrey Jouannet, 24, is found hidden under the bed in her small apartment in Soisy-sur-Seine. It soon becomes apparent that the young woman has been tortured at length before being strangled.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Mysterious Murder at the Farm (Valerie Bary Case)
programme.desc: On Friday, March 26, 2004, in the region of Dijon, Laurent Bary came home from his work to discover the lifeless body of his wife, Valerie, bathing in a pool of blood.
programme.sub-title: A Mysterious Murder at the Farm (Valerie Bary Case)

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 303
programme.desc: Doris var med i en alvorlig bussulykke og i dag sliter hun med ekstreme bivirkninger av en operasjon som egentlig skulle ha reddet utseendet hennes etter ulykken.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 601
programme.desc: Charlotte fikk fjernet brystimplantatene sine på grunn av komplikasjoner. Etter det fikk hun en protese for å kompensere for størrelsen på brystene, men protesen er både ubehagelig og upraktisk.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 106
programme.desc: Vi møter fire personer som har gjort plastikkirugi som har fått ødeleggende konsekvenser: blant annet Lone som lever i frykt for at implantatene hennes er kreftfremkallende.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 305
programme.desc: I dag møter vi bl.a. Jonna, som føler at magen hennes ligner et bombekrater etter en operasjon, og Christina, som har tre mislykkede operasjoner bak seg.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 703
programme.desc: Den tidligere burlesk-danseren Grethe måtte i 2011 fjerne begge brystene som en del av hennes behandling av brystkreft.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 101
programme.desc: I kveldens episode møter vi fire ofre for plastiskkirurgiske feiloperasjoner.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 501
programme.desc: Siden puberteten, har Tascha vært lei av sine asymmetriske bryster og har hatt en brystoperasjon. Men Tascha fikk ikke symmetrien hun drømte om, og i dag skammer hun seg over brystene.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 805
programme.desc: Som tenåring har Linette en skjev skillevegg i nesen som gir henne pustevansker. Som 21-åring får hun derfor tilbud om en neseoperasjon for å fikse problemet, men ender opp med en skjev nese.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 105
programme.desc: Sabine fant et tilbud på nettet, men måtte betale dyrt for å spare 50 prosent.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 608
programme.desc: I 2011 velger Sabina å ta en brystforstørrelsesoperasjon. Men allerede et par dager etter operasjonen oppdager hun at brystene hennes henger.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 202
programme.desc: I dagens episode møter vi bl.a. Pernille, som føler seg fanget i sitt eget hjem, og Linda, som er så hemmet av et arr på magen at hun møter opp tidlig på jobb for å unngå å skifte med andre.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 902
programme.desc: Etter en brystoperasjon har Samantha tunge, smertefulle bryster og et skrantende forhold.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 609
programme.desc: For 21 år siden havnet Allan i en voldsom sykkelulykke. Allan er merket for livet, og til tross for flere operasjoner sitter han igjen med arr i ansiktet.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 306
programme.desc: Vi møter Jeanette, som føler seg som en forsøkskanin etter en rekke mislykkede operasjoner. Maria måtte fjerne implantatene sine, og er nå uten bryster. Shahin har smerter etter en ansiktsløftning.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 311
programme.desc: I denne episoden møter vi bl.a. Maria, som etter 11 operasjoner har fått det hun kaller verdens styggeste bryster. Rose fikk en bredere nese etter at hun opererte den.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 405
programme.desc: I denne episoden møter vi Jette, som har valgt ikke å amme sine tre barn på grunn av silikonbrystene sine, og Charlotte som fremdeles har kjøttsår på innsiden av låret etter fettsuging.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 103
programme.desc: Ivana endte ikke bare opp med å bruke en million kroner i USA, men hun ble også offer for en fatal beslutning, tatt av legene mens hun lå i narkose

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 604
programme.desc: Gjennom hele livet har 61 år gamle Lis ønsket å forandre sine små bryster. Derfor valgte hun å ta en brystforstørrelsesoperasjon, men kort tid etter opplevde hun at det påvirket sexlivet hennes.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 903
programme.desc: Nanna har hatt flere brystoperasjoner og korrigeringer, men sitter nå igjen med deformerte, harde bryster. På grunn av operasjonene vil hun ikke at noen skal se henne naken.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 406
programme.desc: I denne episoden møter vi Anita som våkner opp med større bryster enn hun hadde avtalt med kirurgen og nå føler seg som en mini-versjon av Linse Kessler.

programme.title: World of Love Island
programme.desc: Velkommen til Love Island hvor hotte single som leter etter kjærlighet og konkurrerer mot hverandre om å bli på øya. Bøttevis av intriger, drama og, selvfølgelig, mye kjærlighet.

programme.title: World of Love Island
programme.desc: Velkommen til Love Island hvor hotte single som leter etter kjærlighet og konkurrerer mot hverandre om å bli på øya. Bøttevis av intriger, drama og, selvfølgelig, mye kjærlighet.
