programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Gjengen (egentlig Danny) omvandler Shore Store til en stor prisgalla når de feirer 15 år sammen! Kjøttbollene foreslår at de skal finne kjærligheten til Vinnys mamma.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Jersey Shore Family Vacation Reunion del 1
programme.desc: Gjengen gjenforenes for å feire 15 år med kaos og ikoniske øyeblikk. Fra Cape Mays spøkelsesjakt til Nicoles familebakgrunnsreise. Første del viser overraskelser, favorittminner og det store spørsmålet: er Sammi og Ronnie klare til å skvære opp?
programme.sub-title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation Reunion del 1

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Gjenforeningen fortsetter med sol, skygge og sjokkøyeblikk. Gjengen opplever drama og moro på Jamaica. Er Angelina og Lauren fortsatt låst i "småunge"-krangelen? Pluss favorittøyeblikk, overraskelsesgjester og latter i løpet av 15 år med strandliv.
programme.sub-title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation Reunion del 2

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: What's in the Bag?
programme.desc: Etter fem år fra hverandre, skal våre favoritt-guidos gjenforenes i Miami under en familieferie, men The Situations juridiske problemer setter ferien hans i fare.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Ring
programme.desc: Ronnie og Deenas uløste problemer kommer opp til overflaten igjen, og når The Situation ankommer, er hele familien samlet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Sunday Vinday
programme.desc: Ronnie tetter alle toalettene i huset og Nicole og Vinnys felles fortid setter vennskapet deres på spill.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Ron Ron Juice
programme.desc: En natt med Ron-Ron Juice har snudd hele huset på hodet, og en fransk pike på nattklubben får Ronnie til å sette spørsmålstegn ved alt.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: About Last Night
programme.desc: Ronnie spinner helt ute av kontroll etter å ha tatt utrolig dårlige valg natten før, og Mike har store nyheter å fortelle.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Meatball Down
programme.desc: Vinnie opplever en klippekatastrofe, guttekvelden ødelegges av en full tulling, og Ronnie må ta en telefon til moren til barnet sitt.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Baby Mama Drama
programme.desc: Ron setter forholdet sitt i fare når han prøver å plukke opp en stripper, og hele huset er stressa når moren til babyen til Ron skal komme - Jen.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Temptation of the Keto Guido
programme.desc: Snooki tas på fersken når hun stjeler fra en stripper, Vinny blir fristet og synder kanskje, og Pauly D leter etter kjærlighet.
programme.sub-title: The Temptation of the Keto Guido

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Umm, Hello
programme.desc: Det er guttas helg og jentene skal hjem og besøke sine kjære. Med jentene ute av huset bestemmer Pauly seg for å invitere deres tidligere samboer, Angelina, til Miami.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Meatball Training Day
programme.desc: Angelina er tilbake i Miami og huset er i full gang igjen. Etter år med konflikter og tumulter - klarer Angelina å komme på godfot med sine gamle samboere?

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Angelina Leaves Her Mark!
programme.desc: Guidoene fortsetter festen på Bahamas, og Angelina forlater gjengen på sjokkerende vis.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: JWoww vs. The Proposal
programme.desc: Ronnie er på vei utfor igjen, Vinny får en smak av hjemme, og irritasjon mellom Mike og Jwoww kan ødelegge Mikes frieri.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Future Mrs. Situation?
programme.desc: Ronnie setter spørsmålstegn ved alt, mens Mike forbereder seg på å fri til Lauren.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Final Supper
programme.desc: Utblåsninger serveres med knyttnever under den siste familiemiddagen når det koker over for Ronnie og The Situation.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Road to Vacation: Jersey Shore's Snookiest Moments
programme.desc: Jenni, Ronnie, Snooki, Deena og Pauly teller ned Snookis 15 morsomste, mest opprørende og uforglemmelige duste-øyeblikk.
programme.sub-title: Road to Vacation: Jersey Shore's Snookiest Moments

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Road to Vacation: Jersey Shore's Hottest Hookups
programme.desc: Vinny, Mike, Deena og Pauly teller ned de 15 heiteste Jersey Shore-dates fra Seaside til Miami til Italy og tilbake igjen.
programme.sub-title: Road to Vacation: Jersey Shore's Hottest Hookups

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Road to Vacation: Jersey Shore's Biggest Blow-ups
programme.desc: Jenni, Ronnie, Vinny, Pauly og Mike teller ned de 14 største kranglene som har skjedd i Jersey Shore-serien, og ser tilbake på de beste fornærmelsene, slagene og slåsskampene.
programme.sub-title: Road to Vacation: Jersey Shore's Biggest Blow-ups

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Most Jersiest Moments
programme.desc: Mike, Pauly, Ronnie og Vinny treffes og ser tilbake på de 'Jersieste' øyeblikkene fra deres familieferie i Miami. Vi ser de beste spiralene, de aller morsomste pussene, de verste toalettene og fem scener som vi aldri har fått se før.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Eric has been spotted at a downtown hotel with a beautiful woman and the whole town is talking.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: When Annie and Matt are held up at gunpoint, they're robbed of their money and their sense of security.
programme.sub-title: See No Evil, Hear No Evil, Speak No Evil

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Aunt Julie comes to visit for Thanksgiving and brings her drinking problem with her.
programme.sub-title: The Last Call for Aunt Julie

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Matt's new girlfriend seeks refuge from the divorce wars amongst his warm and loving family.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Plans for Lucy’s surprise birthday party backfire and Happy has puppies.
programme.sub-title: With a Little Help from My Friends

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: When Mary steals a glass, Matt takes the rap and gets busted.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Eric's desire to adopt a young runaway may create a permanent rift with his own father.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: When mom and dad go camping, the kids throw a party and quickly lose control.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: The school bully experiences a severe lapse in judgment when he tries to bully Mary.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Camille, a beautiful girl with a wild reputation, befriends Mary, and starts to influence her behavior.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Eric puts his job on the line to help an ex-con with his problems.
programme.sub-title: Faith, Hope and the Bottom Line

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Eric's parents come to visit and almost lose their newly adopted son George.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Lucy's best friend moves away, while Annie's best friend from high school returns and makes a pass at Matt.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Annie blows a fuse when her recently widowed father comes to town with his new girlfriend. Wait till she finds out that Mary’s new boyfriend has a son.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Mary undergoes surgery after getting hit by a car and Annie prays for strength to forgive her father.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Don't Take My Love Away
programme.desc: At the church, Mary and Lucy get into a brawl right before the ceremony. It seems to clear the air and the slightly disheveled girls reappear with big smiles as the wedding march begins.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: See You in September
programme.desc: Annie and Eric can’t wait for the kids to go back to school, but they’re no sooner out the door than they’re home again...and in trouble.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: I Love You
programme.desc: When Matt catches the younger kids snooping, he sets a trap. But he catches Dad instead.

programme.title: Magnificent Butcher
programme.desc: En ung, hissig slakter, som også er kung fu-disipliner, blir innblandet i en konflikt med et rivaliserende shaolin-tempel. Denne filmen vises uten undertekster.

programme.title: The Shaolin Plot
programme.desc: En brutal prins er fast bestemt på å samle alle kampsportmanualer. Etter å ha fått tak i alle unntatt to, finner han på en dristig plan for å få tak i de strengt bevoktede som befinner seg i Shaolin-tempelet. Denne filmen vises uten undertekster.

programme.title: The Killer Meteors
programme.desc: Hua Wu Bin blir kalt The Killer Meteor takket være hans unike hemmelige kampkunster, som har gjort ham til en helt i hjemtraktene. Når en adelsmann blir forgiftet av sin kone, blir Hua leid inn for å få tak i en kur og beseire henne.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Donatello, Rafael, Michelangelo og Leonardo er muterte, grønne ninja-skilpadder som elsker pizza og lever under New Yorks gateplan. Derifra tar de opp kampen mot den ondskapsfulle forbryteren Shredder og hans armé av svartkledde krigere.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles II: The Secret of the Ooze
programme.desc: Skilpaddene tror at deres fiende Shredder er død etter at han falt i søppelknuseren i slutten av forrige film. Fotklanen har fått vite om deres gjemmested i kloakken og derfor bor de midlertidig hos journalisten April.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles III
programme.desc: Det hele begynner med en at en magisk spire transporterer deres gode venn April gjennom tid og rom, helt til samuraienes Japan. Leonardo og gjengen drar med en gang etter henne, og må nå beseire den onde Lord Naringa for å redde April.

programme.title: Shaolin Wooden Men
programme.desc: Etter å ha vært vitne til drapet på sin far, trener «Little Mute» i Shaolin-tempelet for å ta hevn, der han blir undervist av ulike lærere. Denne filmen vises uten undertekster.

programme.title: Dragon Lord
programme.desc: Jakten på kjærligheten og rampestrekene til Dragon og barndomsvennen Buller blir avbrytt når de hører at en gjeng begynner å smugle kinesiske nasjonal skatter utenlands. Denne filmen vises uten undertekster.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Donatello, Rafael, Michelangelo og Leonardo er muterte, grønne ninja-skilpadder som elsker pizza og lever under New Yorks gateplan. Derifra tar de opp kampen mot den ondskapsfulle forbryteren Shredder og hans armé av svartkledde krigere.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles II: The Secret of the Ooze
programme.desc: Skilpaddene tror at deres fiende Shredder er død etter at han falt i søppelknuseren i slutten av forrige film. Fotklanen har fått vite om deres gjemmested i kloakken og derfor bor de midlertidig hos journalisten April.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John's four attempts to watch the same movie are annoyingly interrupted, Reggie goes back to school and Hattie discovers her husband's infidelity. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John is in an awkward situation when his building super is found dead of natural causes

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker had an ethical decision to make with one of his patients and Reggie is proposed to on her second date with a man. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker is a mentor to a student and Reggie, Bob and Jake come to a standstill in their friendship. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John is accused of being a creature of habit and as a result, tries a new restaurant.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker runs into an old flame and fights with his conscience to spend the night with her because she's a married woman. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker has made a resolution to quit smoking and he announces it to everyone at the diner.
programme.sub-title: Smoke em if You Got em

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Margaret has an erotic dream about John and Linda tries to analyze it. Reggie, Jake and Bob get drunk off a keg of beer. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John has anxiety issues over dating a younger woman and Reggie is getting threats from an ex-convict. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Christmas turns Reggie into a competitive freak; Bob, a greedy super; Jake, a non-participant and John an Angry Head.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John inherits an urn with one of his old patients, Harry in it.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker has a run-in at the office with an elder hostile Jake's grandmother.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Reggie makes John a test subject in her psychology experiment and Jake gets his driver's license renewed. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John Becker goes on a cruise and Jake dates a supermodel. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John is asked to be the keynote speaker at an early graduation for Harding High schools class of 2001.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: After her marriage ends, Megan re-enters Becker's life and he becomes aware of Megan's sordid past. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Linda and Reggie date the same man and Becker unwillingly gets involved. Bob finds out he has a tenant whos a prostitute. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John Becker has insomnia and the gang tries to help him get through it. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John runs into an old college mentor/professor who doesn't remember him. This torments John who tries to get the professor to remember him. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker gets an unexpected visit from his godson who is reluctant to tell his father he's gay. Reggie gets into a caddy argument with her friend, Sara. (TV-PG)
programme.sub-title: You Say Gay Son, I Say Godson

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John thinks the new water deliveryman is bad luck. A string of mishaps occur and everyone blames it on the deliveryman. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John is being sued for malpractice by a patient. Louis knits Margaret a swest (sweater/vest) and Reggie, Bob and Jake discuss the worst ways to die. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Beckers patient sues him for malpractice and Bob sleeps with his Johns lawyer, Ruth. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker sees a psychologist and Linda looks for a new job.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: During an attempt to quit smoking, John attends a for-kids only pancake breakfast.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Jake gets married to a girl he just met. John buys a faux designer clock as a gift, which gets broken.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John helps a homeless man he discovered is a con artist when he learns the man is ill.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John panics when he has to get an MRI, finally resorting to Valium to get through the claustrophobic test.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John takes Reggies advice to be more sensitive with women. It helps at the office with Margaret, but backfires with a woman he is dating.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John is surprised when a patient is disappointed at the news that he's not terminally ill. Jake scams Bob in a Scrabble game.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Reggie goes out to dinner with her abusive friend Sara and Sara's husband, Richard. She finds that she and Richard are attracted to each other.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John tries to keep a casual love affair alive, while Bob tries to turn a found Super Bowl ring into his ticket to fame and fortune.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John believes that Christmas is a phony time of the year. Instead of embracing the Christmas spirit, he uses getting robbed as vindication for his position.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker and the crew decide to barter services office visits for food and services.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker obsesses over whether or not younger women still find him attractive. Linda takes advantage of a hard-working temp.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker gets in hot water with parents when his nutrition lecture at an elementary school turns into a sex talk.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John gets a portable talking computer for his speech-impaired patient, with unintended consequences.

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution: Factories of Death
programme.desc: Året 1942 skal bli det mest betydningsfulle i "Den Endelige Løsningen", ettersom nazistene nå begynner å gjennomgå Vest-Europa og til og med tar jøder fra steder så fjernt som de britiske Kanaløyene.

programme.title: Secret War: The Aristocrat and the Balkan Communists
programme.desc: Fitzroy Maclean, an MP and WWII spy, supported Tito's Communist partisans in Yugoslavia against the Germans, forging a lasting friendship and honored at Tito's funeral post-war.
programme.sub-title: The Aristocrat and the Balkan Communists

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The Belgian Collaborator
programme.desc: Leon Degrelle, a charismatic Belgian leader, joined the Nazis and led Die Wallonien on the Eastern Front. Despite no military background, he earned the Knight's Cross for valor. He recruited 4000 more for the SS, defending Berlin until April 1945.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: The Misfits Gather
programme.desc: Hitler finds his political destiny in post-war Munich. He quickly dominates a fringe party & builds it into the Nazi Party. He recruits infamous men to the cause including Herman Goering & Heinrich Himmler & they plot a coup known as the Beerhall Putsch.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Closing the Ring
programme.desc: The Western Allies secure supply routes that will allow them to enter Germany, and the Ardennes counter-offensive fails. The Red Army advances rapidly. The SS implements the Holocaust.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: Tanks have transformed warfare since their debut a century ago. Host Wil Willis traces their evolution from World War One breakthroughs to modern marvels like the M1 Abrams, the world's most powerful Main Battle Tank.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: Could the mighty M2 be the greatest machine gun in history? Nicknamed “Ma Deuce”, this American machine gun has dominated battlefields for over 80 years. Host Wil Willis tests it and recreates Audie Murphy’s famous Medal of Honor moment.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Victory in the Pacific
programme.desc: Japan continues its suicidal resistance, and invading it looks costly. After 2 atomic bombs, the Emperor intervenes and stops the War. Stalin grabs territory in East Asia. The War is over, and the Atomic Era and the Cold War start.

programme.title: WWII's The Great Escapes: The Freedom Trails: France and Spain: The Pyrenees
programme.desc: Monty treks one of the toughest and most famous freedom trails out of Nazi controlled France, taking him through the valleys and high ridges of the Pyrenees mountains and into Spain.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: Vidkun Quisling
programme.desc: Vidkun Quisling, once honored for diplomacy, turned traitor by collaborating with Nazis. His bid for power in Norway failed, relegated by Germans. Despite being named "fuehrer," his reign led to repression until his hanging post-Nazi defeat.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The Devil's Due
programme.desc: During WWII, Greek Prime Ministers Tsolakoglou, Logothetopoulos, and Rallis collaborated with Nazi occupiers, imposing fees that caused a famine.

programme.title: Hitler's Mega Plane
programme.desc: In January 2012, Italian divers discovered the wreck of a massive plane off the coast of Sardinia. At a depth of 65 meters (213 feet) lies a Messerschmidt “Gigant”, the biggest aircraft in WWII.

programme.title: Secret War: The Dutch Disaster
programme.desc: Operation North Pole was a WWII German deception using captured SOE agents to mislead Britain. 47 of 50 agents were captured. Despite warnings, SOE ignored signs of compromise to maintain support, leading to a major intelligence failure.

programme.title: Secret War: The Mafia Connection
programme.desc: Lucky Luciano, a mafia boss of the 1930s, was in jail in 1942 on charges of running prostitution rings. US intelligence services did a deal with him and he got the Italians to share intelligence on German U boat movements.

programme.title: Hitler and I: Reflections on Evil
programme.desc: An in-depth, behind-the-scenes exploration of the making of the miniseries "Hitler: The Rise of Evil."

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The Arajs Kommando
programme.desc: Viktor Arajs, a Latvian, played a significant role in the Holocaust, collaborating with the Nazis to eliminate Jews. Leading the Arajs Kommando, he orchestrated the killings of around 30,000 Jews. Arajs justified his actions as patriotic defense.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The IRA Conspiracy
programme.desc: During WWII, the IRA's "S Plan" aimed to bomb Britain, drawing German support to weaken the British. "Operation Green" and "Plan Kathleen" envisioned IRA aiding a German invasion of Northern Ireland, but both failed due to bungling and infighting.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls fight to become the face of an advertising campaign, and an underwater photoshoot yields unexpected results.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: After their first go-see challenge the models take part in a photoshoot with help from cycle 2 runner-up Abbey Clancy.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls pose for a photoshoot with the Script and one girl is warned about her attitude.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls arrive in Buenos Aires and have their first photoshoot abroad. Tensions mount as a plane ticket awaits one of the girls.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The final four face go-sees and the final 3 is revealed.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The three remaining girls arrive in Buenos Aires for the Fashion Week. They have to work backstage.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The pressure mounts as the remaining two competitors face the glare of the press and the glamour of the modeling high-life before their final showdown.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: In the 90 minute season premiere 25 girls arrive at bootcamp and meet their host Elle Macpherson. They also come face to face with the other judges, fashion designer Julian MacDonald, stylist Grace Woodward and ex-male model Charley Speed.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: In the first week of the main competition, the final 14 move into their new model house and participate in a lingerie themed photo shoot. The girls then have their first official elimination of the main competition. One girl is sent home.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls receive their makeovers, but not all are happy with their new looks. The models are assigned a photoshoot wearing Links of London couture.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls meet Girls Aloud singer Nicola Roberts and take part in a photoshoot for Beat Bullying.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls take part in a posing challenge on Carnaby Street then film a commercial for Beyonce's new fragrance 'Heat'. The photoshoot involves being covered in chocolate which proves difficult for one girl who shows up hungover.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Alesha Dixon meets the models and tasks them with selling her new jewelry line on live television. After meeting Grace in Gatwick airport they are given £500 to go on a shopping spree. They are then whisked off to Spain to do a photoshoot in swim wear.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls take part in an acting challenge on the Hollyoaks set and one girl gets carried away on a night out with some of the cast members. The girls must do a horror style photoshoot.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The models face an icy photoshoot when they fly off to Norway.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: This week the girls do a beauty shoot for Revlon and some girls are pushed over the edge in a second shoot for 'Galaxy Ripple'.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: A challenge with Nicky Johnston sees one model facing harsh criticism. The girls then do a photoshoot with TV personality George Lamb and take part in a photoshoot with a London Rugby team for legendary photographer Terry O'Neill.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The final 5 arrive in Kuala Lumpar and meet with fashion legend Jimmy Choo to take part in a dance challenge. The photoshoot this week takes place at night for Baby G watches.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The final 4 are sent on go-sees around Kuala Lumpar and are sent to the jungle for their photoshoot.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Andi hires a pretty, young babysitter, Sophia (Victoria Justice), to watch the kids, and gets jealous when her daughter, Kate, goes to her instead for advice.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam discovers that the pastor he hired for their wedding was a phony and he and Andi aren't really married, he scrambles to find a way to fix it before she finds out.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam needs to hire a new project manager, Andi accuses Adam of unconscious bias after he only interviews men for the job.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam notices his Dad's increasingly forgetful behavior, he struggles with how to approach him to discuss it.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When the kids won't do their chores, Adam and Andi decide to go on strike too.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam thinks Kate's boyfriend, Tyler (Griffin Gluck), is a pothead, he decides to confront Tyler but doesn't get the support he expects from Andi.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam takes his kids to work with him for the day, they accidentally give his biggest client lice. Also, Andi feels like a bad mom when she's the only one in the family not to get lice.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam and Andi agree on a present-free Valentine's Day, Adam gives the gift he planned for Andi to his mother instead.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi try to get back in their neighbors' good graces after no one shows up to their potluck.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam and Andi are caught off guard by unexpected expenses, they each decide to give up a luxury to pay them off.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Andi gets Bev (Swoosie Kurtz) a spot volunteering at the hospital, Joe becomes bored and starts spending too much time with Adam.
programme.sub-title: Guess Who's Coming to Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Andi and Adam disagree about Kate attending a dance with an older boy, Adam tries to outsmart Andi to win the argument.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam attempts to organize a birthday dinner for Andi and he discovers that managing guests isn't easy.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam and Andi lose footage of an intimate moment they accidentally recorded, they have to track it down before anyone can see it.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Andi's folks decide to visit them for Easter, Adam and Andi have to keep the peace between both sets of parents.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam insists that pranks are harmless fun, Andi creates an elaborate hoax to teach him a lesson.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam is determined to figure out what Andi's hiding when he discovers she's been keeping secrets from him for his own good.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam is thrilled and honored to help Joe buy a new car but is caught off guard when Joe suddenly becomes irritable, and the negotiations go off track.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam and Don realize they need to bring in more business, they film a commercial advertising their company.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi set up Adam's boss on a date to boost her spirits in the hope that she'll then be in the mood to have Adam resume work on the mini-mall.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Andi proposes an exciting idea for Adam and her to go into business together when she isn't able to find work. Also, Adam tackles the most challenging job of his life - renovating Joe and Bev's (Swoosie Kurtz) kitchen.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam attempts to make the office feel more inviting since Andi will be joining him at work every day; Lowell hides a life-changing secret.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi have a disagreement at the office and must prevent it from becoming a problem at home; the kids try to extend Lowell's stay at their house after realizing he's an amazing cook.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam sees a kid push Emme, he convinces Teddy to defend his younger sister; Adam and Don persuade Joe to hire a nurse to help him after he has his upcoming knee surgery.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: As a leading figure in Japanese cuisine, Tatsujiro Yoshida has tackled the rough waves of the sea of Japan. Will Yoshida have what it takes when surf is up at Kitchen Stadium?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Challenger Senji Osada deploys 'vacuum cooking,' a French cooking technique born in the 21st century. Will Senji have what it takes in his battle of scallop dishes with Iron Chef Sakai?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Kunbi Lin's former battle at Kitchen Stadium against the legendary Iron Chef Nakamura finished in a draw. Will Lin be able to claim victory this time?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The long-awaited challenger Katsuaki Mori has been awarded the prestigious 'Chevalier du Taste-Fromage,' France's highest honor for cheese.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: It's only rookie Iron Chef Nakamura's third battle. Will he be able to withstand Challenger Toyoaki Suganuma's egg challenge?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Challenger Gyobun Hou is ready to chop the lettuce with confidence against Iron Chef Chen. Who will reign supreme when we witness this legendary leafy battle?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Iron Chefs always have trouble with female challengers. How will Iron Chef Nakamura fight back against Katsuko Nanao's affectionate home-cooked dishes?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Iron Chef Chen is ready to display his skills in spicy Szechuan cooking against Kitchen Stadium's first challenger specializing in Thai cuisine, Shunji Morikawa. Be ready for a very 'hot' battle.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Kitchen Stadium fills with the scent of the sea when Challenger Tamotsu Takao, a French restaurant specialist, takes on Iron Chef Sakai.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Dr. Hattori was thinking about recommending Challenger Kenji Motai as the next Iron Chef Japanese. Iron Chef Nakamura is ready and willing to test Motai's mettle in the battle of udon noodles.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Today's challenger is a French-influenced Italian chef of such renown that anywhere he cooks, you'll find people waiting in long lines.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: It's a chicken battle for the ages when Iron Chef Ishinabe is challenged by Chef Jacques Borie who holds the distinguished rank of MOF.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Morimoto’s debut as an Iron Chef brings a difficult challenger: Yukio Hirayama.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Iron Chef Kobe and Mario Frittoli, who both learned from masters of Italian cuisine, will face off in this battle of broccoli.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Iron Chef Morimoto engages Challenger Masayoshi Kimura in this battle of rice.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Chef Sakai, known as the Iron Chef French, will have his hands full in this battle specially designed around Wedgwood china.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The challenger is a master chef hailing from Kyoto. He has the support of the former Iron Chef Michiba and Dr. Yatori. Can the Iron Chef win this battle?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The challenger is a seafood expert who chooses and masterfully cooks gifts from the sea. He has apprenticed in the top kitchens of Japan. Which competitor will find the soul of the sea?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The challenger is a stubborn chef descended from a long line of Tokyo dwellers. The Iron Chef will have his hands full facing such a strong tradition.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The challenger is one of the few Mexican food specialists in Tokyo. This is a Latin duel at Kitchen Stadium.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Firepower Operation
programme.desc: The world is littered with the remains of forgotten muscle cars. At Graveyard Carz, some will get a second chance in the hands of Mark Worman and the Ghouls.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Dave traded for his dream 1957 Corvette more than three decades ago, but his plans to build it have so far come to nothing. Ken chose a rare 1954 Kaiser Darrin from his father’s collection and its now on FantomWorks to reverse the hands of time.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Bob spent years working on his beloved 1969 K20 Truck, but he needs FantomWorks to solve the mysteries within. Dan’s brother-in-law John shows up with a 1962 Ferrari kit car that looks hot, but the wiring could burn it to the ground.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.desc: A new season of Graveyard Carz, the show wherein abandoned and left­for­death classic Mopars are given a new lease on life.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Steve has only driven his prized 1969 Camaro Z28 at five miles an hour, but he wants it to be a muscle car beast. Scott owns a rare matching numbers 1964 Corvette that he wants brought back to life.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Nick bought his wife Danielle a 1953 Chevy Pickup for her 28th birthday. The couple wants a perfect FantomWorks restoration. The truck has other ideas. Eric’s rare 1939 LaSalle is a sight to behold, but it hasn’t seen a wrench in eighty years.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Rick comes to FantomWorks for a nightmare combination of gadgets, gizmos, and upgrades for his 1972 Cadillac Hearse. Merlyn and Lynn are farmers from Minnesota with a 1959 Chevy Apache that’s so dangerous they’ve never driven it beyond their driveway.

programme.title: Muscle Cars of Texas
programme.desc: Vinnie and Jan are visiting Mecum Auctions in Houston, Texas checking out some of the coolest classic muscle cars about to hit the auction block!

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Ian wants a 1956 ‘baby bird’ restomod that drives like a sports car. Dan’s solution – a GTO-Thunderbird combo that drives like a bat out of hell. Doc Pellerin’s 1937 Volvo was a regular winner at Concours car shows – until a shelf fell on the car…

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Patsy and Apryle bring their 1968 Corvette in for mechanical work, but what their car really needs is a new paint job. Jim’s 1958 Impala is an auction car. It looks pretty but when it’s time to drive – it’s half the car Jim was hoping for.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Mark Unwrapped
programme.desc: A new season of Graveyard Carz, the show wherein abandoned and left­for­death classic Mopars are given a new lease on life.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Roaming the Restorations
programme.desc: A new season of Graveyard Carz, the show wherein abandoned and left­for­death classic Mopars are given a new lease on life.

programme.title: Muscle Cars of Texas
programme.desc: The 63 Z06 is getting more fiber glass work done on the inside. Vinnie is working on replacing the windows on the 442 and putting the guts in the door. Plus, we head to Galveston for the Galveston Corvette Show.

programme.title: Muscle Cars of Texas
programme.desc: Vinnie and the team at Muscle Cars of Texas install airbags on the 48 Dodge. Team gets ready for the Galveston Classic Car show.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Arnold brings Dan two interlocking projects. He wants FantomWorks to transform his 1946 Ford Panel Wagon into a classic tour-mobile, and he also wants Dan to fix the 1941 Harley Flathead motorcycle that will ride in the back.

programme.title: The Ride Life
programme.desc: Japanese car culture holds a special place in Sung's heart. He's back exploring the home of drifting to see the coolest mods, and quirkiest characters. Sung finds that a quest for brilliance and excellence makes this the best place to get inspired.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Ben wants a partial restoration for his father’s 1962 Maserati, but Dan sees only one solution – turning this heirloom into one of the rarest survivor cars on earth. Raymond and Diane only want one thing for their worn out 1966 bug – perfection.

programme.title: The Ride Life
programme.desc: Despite a troubled past of poverty and invasions, Korea has emerged as a car building power-house. Through its unheralded and talented-loaded car scene, Sung reconnects with the land of his birth and finds peace with his estranged mother.

programme.title: Muscle Cars of Texas
programme.desc: Vinnie and the team are getting the sound system ready inside the 1969 Mustang Malicious Intent. The 1950 Ford has miles of wiring to install.

programme.title: Muscle Cars of Texas
programme.desc: Vinnie and the team are priming the 1972 Nova to help prevent it from rusting. We take a look back at all the cool stuff that has happened in the shop.

programme.title: Muscle Cars of Texas
programme.desc: Vinnie and the team are looking at a custom LS3 motor . The 1960 Corvette is getting work done on its brake pads.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Taming a 1971 Challenger R/T
programme.desc: A new season of Graveyard Carz, the show wherein abandoned and left­for­death classic Mopars are given a new lease on life.

programme.desc: Snooker 900 er den nye hurtige og spennende versjonen av spillet! Kom og se ukentlige konkurranser, arkiv spill, studio segmenter og mye mer.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A man whose son died in Vietnam learns that he has an Amerasian grandson.
programme.sub-title: Another Kind of War, Another Kind of Peace

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A children's-show host has a warm-hearted TV persona but is actually a cynic at heart.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Another angel is upset that Jonathan has been assigned to find a mate for his widow.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Bickering couples go on a trip to learn what it was that brought them together.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark work to keep the three couples together.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A 12-year-old genius at college is treated as a social outcast by his less intelligent but more socially adept schoolmates.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A wealthy businessman would like to bridge the gap between himself and his son.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan tries to convince a powerful senator to restore severe budget cuts dealing with health care. However, the assignment seems doomed when the senator suffers a fatal heart attack.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Mark plans to give a recent windfall to a boys' club. But first, he must deal with some con artists.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark's assignment at Christmastime is to show a disillusioned columnist that there's still some good out there.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark pose as priests in order to re-open an abandoned church as a shelter when a major fire breaks out in a neighborhood.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Wally is a hobo and street puppeteer whose caring and goodness have made him an angel without him knowing it.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A struggling pianist tries to start life again after a heart attack.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: High school seniors hope they get the dates they want for prom.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: An estranged daughter is writing a vengeful expose about her mother, a much-beloved movie star.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark visit a halfway house for people who were confined to mental facilities but released because they were deemed no longer a danger to society.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A Vietnam vet is denied government assistance, despite having lost a leg and an arm.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: With Matt out of town, Doc only has Chester to protect him when his life is threatened.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: So Long, Dora, So Long
programme.desc: As Jim Kelly and Dora Hand prepare to wed, Jim Rellance from Texas hopes to marry Dora. Dora tells him to find a younger girl and Earp tells him to leave Dodge City.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Wyatt's Brothers Join Up
programme.desc: After the death of Old Man Clanton, Doc Holliday hatches a scheme involving Wyatt's brothers to help him in his desire to create an internal fight among the Clanton gang members.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Dodge City Gets a New Marshal
programme.desc: Earp takes the job of Dodge City Marshal. He arrives to find the Sheriff and his deputy under siege and the men on Front Street trying to kill him.
programme.sub-title: Dodge City Gets a New Marshal

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Matt and Chester act as decoys to ambush outlaws that are masking their crimes as those of renegade Indians.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A dishonest gambler uses a mentally challenged man in a plot against Matt.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Requiem for Old Man Clanton
programme.desc: Wyatt tries to put a stop to ongoing border skirmishes between the Clanton gang and Mexican bandits.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Peter arrives in Sacramento to revive his family's fortune but learns Phineas Colby has monopolized the town.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Zack and Zeke, slaves from Louisville, seek to buy their freedom by digging for gold.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: John is given the task of turning a small group of Apache men into a force that can aid the U.S. Calvary.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A singer wants to give up the fame and return home.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A young outlaw is reformed by the kindness and help of an elderly female junk collector.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: An outlaw holds up a stagecoach carrying a murderer to trial.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Farmer Carlo Farelli wants to marry beautiful saloon girl Della but must first deal with a town gangster.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: The Hole Up
programme.desc: Wells Fargo asks Earp to go undercover into the badlands to capture Blackie Saunders wanted for a robbery and murder.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Loyalty
programme.desc: Doc Holliday hits a long winning streak at the card tables and winds up with stock in a mine and railroad, both of which soon have a tremendous jump in value.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Sam Kee, ostracized because he's Chinese, finds refuge at a fort after saving a soldier's life.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A notorious Apache is in the area and a local captain's son is missing.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A boy runs away from home and into the arms of an outlaw after a falling out with his father.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Gunfight at the O.K. Corral
programme.desc: Earp recalls in court the details of the day when the Clanton gang rode into Tombstone to shoot it out with the Earps.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Cowpoke Curt Morrison and pal Josh locate a spring on Native land soon to be opened to homesteaders.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Louie Pheeters is found intoxicated beside a dying man and, unable to remember what took place, is accused of murder.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Wyatt Meets Doc Holliday
programme.desc: Earp is looking for information on Mike Roarke at Shanssey's Camp where he finds Doc Holliday may be able to help. Doc refuses as he has his own agenda with Roarke.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Warpath
programme.desc: An Army officer is captured by Pawnee Indians who have left the reservation and bought faulty guns.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Colonel Lounsberry is selected by General Custer to be the only newspaperman to travel with the troops.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Old Jake
programme.desc: Earp spots old buffalo hunter Jake Caster in a saloon. Jake now lives with his wife's tribe, the Cheyenne, but Earp wonders if Jake has changed his ways.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Doc Holliday, looking for cash to finance his gambling, tries to con a banker out of $20,000.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Fortitude
programme.desc: Earp is invited to speak at the Cattlemen's Convention at the Dodge City Opera House. But a source tells Kate Holliday that it is a setup by Texas cattlemen to kill Earp.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Tombstone
programme.desc: Earp decides to ride into Tombstone alone and unarmed to see for himself how bad it is. He finds himself caught in the midst of an ongoing dispute between the miners and Clantons.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: As the Donner Party attempts to cross the Sierra Nevada Mountains, and the Reed family is banished.

programme.title: Harlequin: Another Woman
programme.desc: Da Lisa våkner på sykehuset, husker hun ingenting:at mannen hennes Paul vil skille seg fra henne, eller at hun ble brutalt slått og etterlatt for å dø. Når Paul tar henne med hjem, må Lisa lære alt på nytt. NB Denne filmen vises uten norske undertekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: Treacherous Beauties
programme.desc: Anne mistenker at broren Alans død ikke var en ulykke. Hun begynner å jobbe for en familie som kan ha hatt en finger med i spillet, men blir snart forelsket i den eldste sønn. NB Denne filmen vises uten norske undertekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: Broken Lullaby
programme.desc: En foreldreløs jentes (Mel Harris) jakt etter fortiden begynner med et barndomsbilde av henne selv ved siden av en sjelden spilledåse, og fører henne til en lokkende skattejeger. NB Denne filmen vises uten norske undertekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: At the Midnight Hour
programme.desc: En vakker barnepike(Liz) fanger oppmerksomheten Richard, en enkemann og vitenskapsmann, og hans begavede sønn Andy. Liz' liv blir truet når hun kommer for nær sannheten om hvem som drepte den tidligere hans frue. NB Denne filmen vises uten norsketekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: The Awakening
programme.desc: When a bounty hunter who's tracking one of her tenants convinces Sara McAllister to team up with him, they start an adventure into the dangerous world of international espionage and love.

programme.title: Harlequin: This Matter of Marriage
programme.desc: Arkitektene Hallie og Donnalee arbeider med et stort byggeprosjekt for en eksentrisk milliardær, Adam Barr. Hallieshar lett etter drømmemannen, finner ham plutselig rett ved siden av. NB Denne filmen vises uten norsketekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: Hard to Forget
programme.desc: Privatdetektiv Max etterforsker Sandra Applewhites død og er overbevist om at hennes ektemann John Gilman drepte henne. Når han møter Sandras tvillingsøster Nicky, ber han henne om hjelp til å avsløre Gilman. NB Denne filmen vises uten norsketekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: Diamond Girl
programme.desc: Playboy-advokaten Denny ser aldri på sin kjedelige og lojale assistent Claire Bernard. Men når han oppdager at Claire er en uslipt diamant, bestemmer han seg for å forvandle henne til en fortryllende skjønnhet. NB Denne filmen vises uten norsketekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: The Waiting Game
programme.desc: Sarah og Amy er bestevenner for livet og nå arrangerer de sin første kunstutstilling i en liten by i New England. Når en mystisk fremmed dukker opp, starter et mysterium med narkotika, CIA og Sarahs elskede onkel. NB Denne filmen vises uten norsketekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: Loving Evangeline
programme.desc: Robert får vite om sin brors dødelige båtulykke som får han til å dra for å hente liket. Der møter han Evie Shaw som er eieren av marinaen. Han blir besatt av sin brors mistenkelige død... og av Evie. NB Denne filmen vises uten norsketekster.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood L
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' blir Rob, Steelo og deres spesielle gjest Lolo Wood, redd for å få sprøyter i 'Stikkpanikk', får igjen verbalt i 'Ta igjen-attakk' og føler hele dekkmønsteret når de blir 'Overkjørt'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppdager Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood at uhell elsker selskap i 'Du blir med meg', strever med vekter i 'Verstinger med vekstang' og møter noen fryktelig glade papper i 'Overentusiastiske fedre'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' smasher Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood handlevogner med 'Vognkrasjere', deler luftyogaens felles smerte med 'Dinglende duoer' og blir banket opp av gårdsdyr i 'Buskapssmell'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' faller Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood lett i 'Henfallen til fall', forbauser aper voldsomt med 'Apemagi' og har problemer med å finne tingene sine i 'Borte, men funnet'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LIV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' kan ikke Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood løpe fra den morsomme snublingen i 'Fluktfall', viser fram imponerende bisker i 'Hermehunder' og snakker varmt for bruken av solide hodeplagg i 'Skudd fra oven'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' finner Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ut hvor stor skade en strippepåle kan forårsake i «Pål-lateral skade', oppdager at ikke alle liker å bli skremt i 'Skremtraseri' før de avslutter med noen 'Forlatte farer'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' slår Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ut fra tee i 'Sving-ding', krasjer med 'Små landingsmatter' og blir offer for noen 'Byfeller'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood besøk av sangeren Teddy Swims og ser nærmere på folk som 'Mister kontrollen', får faderlige råd i 'Pappavisdom og kaster ut noen problemtyper i 'Vis dem veien ut'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood problemer med å sette seg på grunn av 'Stolnasking', møter brått uventede dyr i 'Dyrestøkk' og bruker god tid på å falle i 'Gradvise fall'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood nærbilkontakt med leppene i 'Bilkyssere', får seg et slag under beltestedet med 'Lavtslåtte damer' og orker ikke å spise når de er sammen med 'Matlystslukkere'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LIX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppdager Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood at telefoner kan være distraherende i 'Telefonblind', møter unger som bør finne seg en annen sportsgren i 'Minigolfere' og besøker noen steder der det er 'Kjempekaldt'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' går Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood smertefullt på hodet i 'Stup hvor som helst', kaster seg på sykkelen i 'Pedaltrøkk rett i pølen' og blir vitner til tupékatastrofer i 'Tupé på vift'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' ser Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood hva som skjer når du ikke lander støtt i 'Ustø landing', sjekker de mest lojale kjærestene i 'Jeg er opptatt' og avslutter med uheldige campere i 'Glamourløs camping'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' krasjer Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood med stil idet de 'Flyr over styret', spaserer på løs grunn i 'Fallgulv' og drar for å gjøre innkjøp altfor sent i 'Grubutikken'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' hogger Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ned trær med noen 'Tømmerflopper', får seg noen 'Luftige-svev-madrasser' og har det kjempekult på 'Rockeførskolen'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXIV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' havner Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood i 'Faresoner', avklarer ulike situasjoner av 'Glassknas' og oppnår betydelig høyde med 'Flygebiler'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' møter Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood ufokuserte fedre med 'Distraherte pappahjerner', driver høyt spill i golf med 'Djerv gjenvinning' og viser sine fiseferdigheter når de utfører 'Gasstriks'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppsummerer Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood kostnadene ved å ha barn i 'Dyre barn', snubler over sirkusartister som lager 'Plutselig sirkus' og opplever slitsomme feiringer med 'Dårlige bursdager'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' denger Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood hodet i veggen som første trekk i 'Kraftskaller', ødelegger golfutstyret sitt i 'På tide med nye køller' og møter farene ved å benytte 'Samkjøring om natten'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' utforsker Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood ildidrettens verden i 'Flammesport', finner ut hvor farlige dører kan være i 'Helt av hengslene' og blir overrasket over noen svært 'Uventede raketter'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXIX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' krasjer Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood inn i ubevegelige gjenstander i 'Parkert smerte', oppdager at trafikkflyten kan påvirkes av bisarre årsaker i 'Motorveiforsinkelser' og opplever farene ved 'Olme okser'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' støter Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood på farlige voltere uten 'Saltobevissthet', opplever smerten ved knuste tohjulinger i Billigsykler' og oppdager at heis og fyll ikke går så godt sammen i 'Heisa-heistur'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXXI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' prøver Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood å muntre opp folk som er 'Vinterdeppa', finner ut hva som skjer når du faller og opplever 'Fjes mot gjerde' og ødelegger perfekte øyeblikk med 'Triste forlovelsesopptak'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' lider Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood av 'Konsertforvirring', får smaken på 'Søvnsnacks' og flykter fra noen 'Hissige sammenstøt'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og medvert Lolo Wood det tøft når de flytter ut og blir 'Såre flyttefolk', møter noen nye medarbeidere som er 'Dumme på jobben' og finner ut at det er greit å gi opp i 'Vi kutter ut'

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' går Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood på trynet i gresset idet de 'Eter plen', blir veltrent og hårete med muskelforbundne 'Gymhunder' og går langt under null i 'Dypfryst moro'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' er Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood en fare for seg selv i 'Selvfelling', drar på gymet for å få seg en 'Boksesekktrøkk' og går langt i å utfordre høydeskrekken med 'Elleville høyder'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' gjør Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood en smidig sorti over 'Sikkerhetsgjerder', trenger å rense bilinteriøret i 'Bil-kryp' og tester chuggekapasiteten i 'Styrterekyl'

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne 'Ridiculousness' har Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood med en spesiell gjest, Dee Snider, og møter rebeller i 'Tenker ikke å tåle det', opplever band som sliter i 'Kommer ikke til å slå gjennom' og blir nedstemt av spilt kaffe i 'Kaffetragedier'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' ser Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood på konsekvensene ved å overse skilt i 'Skiltblind', lærer om merkelige ting som er 'Teknisk sett sant' og finner ut hvordan sprø ting blir 'Sprøere og sprøere'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' ser Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood syklister få seg en overraskelse i 'Uventede sykkelhinder', møter ondskapsfulle katter som viser 'Kattevrede' før de tar en titt på folk som setter hodet fast i 'Skallefeller'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' prøver Rob, Steelo og Kristy Sarah seg på 'Kostymekatastrofer', kommer i kontakt med 'Etikettefjerne folk' og blir vitner til 'Nære på-overganger'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood se folk som snus opp ned av 'Påtvungne overslag', får seg en drink og to for mye med 'Pussa bestemødre' og finner ut grunnen til å unngå dansing med drinker i 'Ikke drikk og dans'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' med Rob, Steelo og Kristy Sarah får vi se strålende treffsikkerhet i 'Skallesnikskyting', finner ut av hva som er motsatt av å prestere under press i 'Vanære under press' og avslutter med noen 'Sjalu hjerter'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' drar Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood for å skate med gjenstander på hjul som er 'Park-uforenlig', tar bilder og får seg en smell i 'Knipseattakk' og holder fast på verdisakene i møte med 'Mobile skurker'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' ser Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood hvor ekstrem bordtennis kan være i 'Pinpongvondt', blir kilt, rosa, svart og blå i en 'Kiletrøkk' og får justert ryggraden med noen 'Bakoverbøyere'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' kommer Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood farlig nær kanten i 'Uten kantfølelse', får bowlingvondt i 'Baneovertredelser' og trenger å slå av konsollen i 'Gamevrede'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' blir Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood sinte i helt feil situasjoner i 'Malplassert raseri', stikker av fra flaue opplevelser med 'Skamsortier' og blir helt uspiselige på flyplassen i 'Terminaltroll'.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison får nok en gang besøk av spøkelset til agent Cooper, som prøver å hjelpe henne med å finne ut hvem den virkelige morderen er i en forvirrende sak.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison har en drøm om et gameshow som kan avsløre løgner, og når hun våkner, hører hun en buzzer i hodet hver gang noen forteller henne en løgn.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison har mistanke om at en savnet kvinne kan være et offer for hennes merkelige barn. I mellomtiden dukker Joes søster Sarah opp uanmeldt.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison våkner fem år tilbake i tid etter at hun og Devalos blir skutt av en fremmed. Tidligere har Allisons drømmer fortalt henne at Devalos vil dømme en uskyldig mann for drap.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: En mann ved navn Lucas Harvey forfølger Allison, overbevist om at han gjør Guds arbeid ved å kvitte seg med henne og hennes evner.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison fortsetter å bli plaget av Lucas Harvey, hennes besatte stalker. Harvey forstyrrer Allisons drømmer, noe som gjør henne lite hjelpsom for Devalos og Scanlon under en sak om en seriemorder.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Etter å ha falt i koma under en etterforskning, finner Allisons ånd veien inn i kroppen til en mann ved navn Todd Emory.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison henvender seg til Cynthia Keener (som nå er i fengsel) når hun begynner å drømme om et tidligere kidnappingsoffer som Cynthia en gang reddet.
programme.sub-title: The First Bite Is the Deepest

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Mens Allison takler Joes jobbflytting til San Diego, drømmer hun om og møter deretter en bankansatt ved navn Mrs. Boddicker som forutså et ran i banken hennes.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Når aspekter av Allisons drøm om å miste hele familien begynner å skje i virkeligheten, frykter hun at drømmen hennes kan gå i oppfyllelse.
programme.sub-title: Bring Me the Head of Oswaldo Castillo

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison og familien hennes må håndtere resultatene av hjerneoperasjonen hennes. Eieren av en lokal TV-stasjon ber også Devalos og Scanlon om å undersøke om sportsankeret hans blir forfulgt.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison blir bekymret etter at Ariel begynner å vise merkelig oppførsel, og begynner å tenke at en myrdet stripper kan besitte henne.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Når Allisons kreftrammede venn dør uventet, mistenker hun at en sykehusansatt kan ha skylden. Bridgette skriver en historie veldig nær det som senere skjer på Joes jobbintervju.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison blir forvirret når hun begynner å se visjoner om merkelige symboler. Når en seriemorder slår Phoenix, oppdager hun at symbolene kan være ledetråder for å fange morderen.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Et spedbarn blir kidnappet fra Allisons nabolag, og hun blir så fast bestemt på å finne barnet at Joe frykter at hun kan ha blitt besatt.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allisons mareritt utspiller seg i scener fra den klassiske filmen Night of the Living Dead, og får henne til å våkne opp med merkelige sår, men også med ledetråder i saken om et drap på en begravelsesagent.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison leier en SUV etter at bilen hennes er skadet, og hun oppdager at SUVens satellittradio lar henne lytte til andres samtaler.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Når Ariel begynner å date en gutt fra skolen, har Allison visjoner som indikerer at han kan være involvert i et lokalt mord.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Etter på merkelig vis å ha blitt følsom for lys, bruker Allison et par solbriller som viser merkelige tall som kan være relatert til folks forventede levealder.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allisons visjoner blir en viktig informasjonskilde for myndighetene når prøvene av en dødelig sykdom forsvinner. I mellomtiden tror Scanlon at han er klar til å fri til Lynn.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike and Sully return from their honeymoon to begin their new life as man and wife.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Baseball fever strikes Colorado Springs when a barnstorming all-star team comes to town.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike's passion for Sully leads to conflict with Colleen.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Matthew is grief-stricken as Dr. Mike tries to save his fiancée from a deadly disease.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Though an elderly patient believes the springs are helping him, Dr. Mike knows his improvements are psychological; Mike wants Sully to play Prince Charming.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike and her neighbors are up in arms when Dorothy becomes a best-selling author.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Loren proposes to Dorothy but has a stroke before she can answer; an old friend wants Sully to come to the gold fields.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dorothy, Myra, and Grace go back to look for Mike; Preston plots to build a hotel-casino with help from his partner, Jake.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike worries that she cannot have a child, as Colorado Springs prepares for a Thanksgiving feast.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike fears she is unable to have a child because of her age; the townspeople debate sharing their feast with the Cheyenne on the reservation.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike searches for her prince charming on Halloween, while also helping an ailing patient.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike's Christmas present from her mother nearly destroys her home, and Brian discovers romance.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: An ailing young stranger brings new life to town, but only Dr. Mike can save him.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Matthew decides to run for sheriff after Colorado Springs is hit by a crime wave.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Matthew, the new town sheriff, falls in love with the wrong kind of woman.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: The residents of Colorado Springs are suckered into a financing scam.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Sully leads the rescue when a boy is kidnapped by a mountain man; Dr. Mike's pregnancy is in danger when she does not take care of herself.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Sully leaves the unruly rescue party to hunt for Matthew on his own; Dr. Mike's least favorite physician takes over her practice.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Charles Matthews forteller Blake en dyster hemmelighet. Zorelli finner avlyttingsutstyr i leiligheten sin. Alexis forteller Monica at Jason Colby ikke er faren hennes.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis truer med å saksøke Blake for halvparten av den stjålne nazi-skatten hvis ikke Sable trekker tilbake søksmålet mot Colbyco. Sable går med på det. Krystina fører Fallon til skatten.

programme.title: Dynasty: Oil
programme.desc: Krystle Grant Jennings forbereder seg på å gifte seg med den rike oljemagnaten Blake Carrington, da Matthew Blaisdel, en tidligere elsker, vender tilbake til byen og gir henne kalde føtter.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Honeymoon
programme.desc: Presserende forretninger avbryter Blake og Krystles bryllupsreise. Steven får jobb hos Matthew Blaisdel. Cecil foreslår at Fallon skal gifte seg med nevøen hans.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Dinner Party
programme.desc: Blake ber Matthew på middag i herskapshuset for å lokke ham tilbake til Denver-Carrington. Krystle ryker i tottene med sjefsbutleren, Joseph. Matthew forteller Krystle at han fortsatt elsker henne.

programme.title: Dynasty: Fallon's Wedding
programme.desc: Stevens ekskjæreste, Ted, kommer fra New York. Fallon gifter seg motvillig med Jeff Colby. Blake hyrer Michael, sjåføren, til å spane for Denver-Carrington.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Chauffeur Tells a Secret
programme.desc: Steven blir mobbet på jobb fordi han er homofil. Blake får snusen i vilkårene for Fallons ekteskap med Jeff. Steven blir tiltrukket av Claudia.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Bordello
programme.desc: Walter tar Steven med til et bordell. Steven får skylden for sabotasjen av Matthews borerigg. Krystle pantsetter diamantene sine for å hjelpe Matthew.

programme.title: Dynasty: Krystle's Lie
programme.desc: Etter å ha fått sparken for sabotasjen av Matthews utstyr, finner en uskyldig Steven ut at han ble lurt. Lindsay blir knust da hun får høre hva som skjedde da hun ble født.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Necklace
programme.desc: Matthew og Walter finner olje. Fallon ber om å få låne smykket Krystle pantsatte for å hjelpe Matthew. Steven og Claudia ligger med hverandre på hytta hans.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Beating
programme.desc: Steven kunngjør at han flytter ut av herskapshuset. Sjåføren, Michael, forteller Blake om Stevens forhold til Claudia. Fallon gjenopptar forholdet med Michael, inntil Blake får noen til å banke opp sjåføren.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Birthday Party
programme.desc: Blake finner ut at Krystle pantsatte smykket for å hjelpe Matthew. Fallon forteller Jeff at hun giftet seg med ham utelukkende for farens skyld. Stevens tidligere elsker, Ted, kommer til Denver.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Separation
programme.desc: Steven forteller Claudia at han tilbrakte natten med Ted. Krystle forlater Blake. Blake ser at Ted omfavner sønnen hans og angriper Ted. Steven anklager faren sin for mord.

programme.title: Dynasty: Blake Goes To Jail
programme.desc: Blake må i retten for mordet på Stevens elsker. Krystle kommer hjem for å være sammen med Blake. Fallon vitnet på vegne av faren, men Steven tilbakeviser påstandene hennes i retten.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Testimony
programme.desc: Blake hevder sin uskyld i retten. Matthew finner ut om Claudias forhold til Steven. Claudia og datteren, Lindsay, er innblandet i en bilulykke.

programme.title: Dynasty: Enter Alexis
programme.desc: Blakes første kone, Alexis, vitner og påstår at Blake kan være voldelig. Matthew stikker av sammen med Lindsay. Alexis forteller Steven at hun er glad i ham. Juryen kunngjør at de har nådd en avgjørelse.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Det är dags för ett nytt avsnitt av reseprogrammet "Nyfiken På" med Rickard Olsson på afterworktv.se Denna gången åker vi till Italien för att följa med Rolf Flyg och Buss på en vinresa

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Vi besöker Gardasjön i Italien och får en fantastisk cykeltur.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Denna gången är Rickard Olsson i Berlin tillsammans med Scandorama och deras gruppresa. Tillsammans med gruppen åker han på dagsutflykter till historiska platser men får även uppleva det nya Berlins mest populära och trendiga områden.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Här ger Rickard Olsson tips om saker du inte får missa när du er på Åland.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Denna gången är det dags för Rickard Olsson att ta sig till Normandie för att besöka de historiska platserna från Andra Världskriget.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Här åker Rickard Olsson ned med Springtime Travel för att testa på en av deras träningssresor.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Här besöker Rickard Olsson, Almunécar. Han tar sig ut på kulturhistoriska platser såväl som världsberömda vingårdar eller träningsresor över hela världen. Missa inte den enda unika och skräddarsydda reseprogrammet för dig som är 55-plus.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Denna gången är det dags för att ta sig ned till Schweiz för att prova på att åka med den berömda Glaciärexpressen.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Rickard tar sig ned till Polen för en rundresa till Krakow och Warzawa

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Rickard tar sig med på en Whiskeyresa och tågresa till Skottland

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Rickard reser till storstaden London för att se vad den har att erbjuda. Följ med honom när han utforskar julmarknader, åker skridskor och besöker världsberömda platser.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Följ med Rickard på en resa till Rostock för den perfekta julekänslan.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Følg med oss på resa til Afrika.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Denna gången befinner vi oss i Kroatien tillsammans med More Sailing som arrangerar seglingsresor över hela världen.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Programmet leds av en av Sveriges allra mest rutinerade teveprofiler, Rickard Olsson. Han tar sig till platser, städer och områden som han är nyfiken på. Missa inte den enda unika och skräddarsydda reseprogrammet för dig som är 55-plus.

programme.title: Nyfiken På

programme.title: Dating Naked UK
programme.desc: Ti singler kler av seg i kjærlighetens navn, og kaster seg inn i en vågal datingerfaring. Nakne begynner de å bli kjent, før forbindelsene settes på prøve.

programme.title: Dating Naked UK
programme.desc: Den første nakne nybegynneren truer umiddelbart forbindelsene. Mens visse forbindelser vokser, tviles det på andre, noe som skaper spenning før en dater dumpes permanent.

programme.title: Dating Naked UK
programme.desc: Daterne søker stadig forbindelser etter den første dumpingen. Det er fritt fram for nye forbindelser da andre brytes. En omgang 'Dare or Bare' gjør at en dater angrer mens tiden tikker for ei av jentene.

programme.title: Dating Naked UK
programme.desc: Det slår gnister når sjalusi og konkurranse tilspisser seg. Et par tar forbindelsen til et nytt nivå, mens tvilens skjær sprer seg over det andre. Før en dramatisk vri på avfallsplassen.

programme.title: Dating Naked UK
programme.desc: To datere kjemper om kompensere for balansen i huset etter sjokket over avfallsplassen. En maskeradefest genererer en sæskilt nakenglede, og for mye tungebevegelser presser et par til bristegrensen.

programme.title: Dating Naked UK
programme.desc: Et par settes på den ytterste prøven da nok en nybegynner kommer. De uten sterke forbindelser føler seg også sårbare.

programme.title: Dating Naked UK
programme.desc: Fjærene blir rufset til i en ny kamp om jentene. Dom og Mike fortsetter videre. Og en fest sendt fra himmelen, ender i en helvetes overraskelse.
